;;;85     #if _ENABLE_RES_3840x2160_50
;;;86             case emRes_3840x2160_50:
;;;87                 memcpy(ps8ResText,"3840x2160@50Hz\0",strlen("3840x2160@50Hz\0"));
;;;88                 break;
;;;89     #endif
;;;90     #if _ENABLE_RES_4096x2160_30
;;;91             case emRes_4096x2160_30:
;;;92                 memcpy(ps8ResText,"4096x2160@30Hz\0",strlen("4096x2160@30Hz\0"));
0000c6  220e              MOVS     r2,#0xe
0000c8  a13b              ADR      r1,|L4.440|
0000ca  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0000cc  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
;;;93                 break;
0000d0  e000              B        |L4.212|
                  |L4.210|
;;;94     #endif
;;;95     #if _ENABLE_RES_4096x2160_60
;;;96             case emRes_4096x2160_60:
;;;97                 memcpy(ps8ResText,"4096x2160@60Hz\0",strlen("4096x2160@60Hz\0"));
;;;98                 break;
;;;99     #endif
;;;100    #if _ENABLE_RES_4096x2160_50
;;;101            case emRes_4096x2160_50:
;;;102                memcpy(ps8ResText,"4096x2160@50Hz\0",strlen("4096x2160@50Hz\0"));
;;;103                break;
;;;104    #endif
;;;105    
;;;106            default:
;;;107                break;
0000d2  bf00              NOP      
                  |L4.212|
0000d4  bf00              NOP                            ;38
;;;108        }
;;;109    
;;;110    }
0000d6  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;111    
                          ENDP

                  LMX_4OUHS_C_LedWork_Loop PROC
;;;385    
;;;386    void LMX_4OUHS_C_LedWork_Loop(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;387    {
;;;388        static bool sl_bLedSta = FALSE;
;;;389        if(!mapp_LMX_4OUHS_C_PlatformTimerExpired(emUserTimer_LedActive))
000002  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000004  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_LMX_4OUHS_C_PlatformTimerExpired
000008  b900              CBNZ     r0,|L7.12|
                  |L7.10|
;;;390            return;
;;;391        mapp_LMX_4OUHS_C_PlatformTimerSet(emUserTimer_LedActive,500);
;;;392    
;;;393        if(sl_bLedSta)
;;;394        {
;;;395            sl_bLedSta = FALSE;
;;;396            led_on(led_name_ActiveLed);
;;;397        }
;;;398        else
;;;399        {
;;;400            sl_bLedSta = TRUE;
;;;401            led_off(led_name_ActiveLed);
;;;402        }
;;;403    }
00000a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L7.12|
00000c  f44f71fa          MOV      r1,#0x1f4             ;391
000010  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;391
000012  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_LMX_4OUHS_C_PlatformTimerSet
000016  4809              LDR      r0,|L7.60|
000018  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]            ;393  ; sl_bLedSta
00001a  b130              CBZ      r0,|L7.42|
00001c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;395
00001e  4907              LDR      r1,|L7.60|
000020  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]            ;395
000022  2102              MOVS     r1,#2                 ;396
000024  f7fffffe          BL       led_work_status_assign
000028  e006              B        |L7.56|
                  |L7.42|
00002a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;400
00002c  4903              LDR      r1,|L7.60|
00002e  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]            ;400
000030  2101              MOVS     r1,#1                 ;401
000032  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;401
000034  f7fffffe          BL       led_work_status_assign
                  |L7.56|
000038  bf00              NOP      
00003a  e7e6              B        |L7.10|
;;;404    
                          ENDP

                  |L7.60|
                          DCD      sl_bLedSta

                          AREA ||i.LMX_4OUHS_C_PrjStatePowerOnInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  LMX_4OUHS_C_PrjStatePowerOnInit PROC
;;;369    // the status when power on device
;;;370    void LMX_4OUHS_C_PrjStatePowerOnInit(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;371    {
;;;372        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
000002  4c0a              LDR      r4,|L8.44|
;;;373        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000004  4625              MOV      r5,r4
;;;374        System_Default_Edid_table = (iTE_u8 *)_6_1920x1080p60;
000006  480a              LDR      r0,|L8.48|
000008  490a              LDR      r1,|L8.52|
00000a  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; System_Default_Edid_table
;;;375    
;;;376        // prj 1ms loop hook
;;;377        pFuncPrj1MsLoopHook = LMX_4OUHS_C_1msTimerIrq;
00000c  480a              LDR      r0,|L8.56|
00000e  490b              LDR      r1,|L8.60|
000010  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; pFuncPrj1MsLoopHook
;;;378    //    pvvFuncMS1826UserFunctionProcess = mapp_4OUHS_MS1826FunctionProcess;
;;;379        pvvFuncMS1826UserFunctionInit = app_LMX_4OUHS_CMS1826UserInit;
000012  480b              LDR      r0,|L8.64|
000014  490b              LDR      r1,|L8.68|
000016  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; pvvFuncMS1826UserFunctionInit
;;;380        g_bEnableDbgFlag = pstBasicVar->bIsDebugEn;
000018  7868              LDRB     r0,[r5,#1]
00001a  490b              LDR      r1,|L8.72|
00001c  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;381    
;;;382        mapp_SetHdmiTx5V(TRUE);
00001e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000020  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_SetHdmiTx5V
;;;383        mapp_RevisionMake();
000024  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_RevisionMake
;;;384    }
000028  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;385    
                          ENDP

00002a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L8.44|

                  |L8.48|

                  |L8.52|

                  |L8.56|
                          DCD      LMX_4OUHS_C_1msTimerIrq
                  |L8.60|

                          AREA ||i.LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecBasicVarDefault||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecBasicVarDefault PROC
;;;245    
;;;246    void LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecBasicVarDefault(void)
000000  492f              LDR      r1,|L9.192|
;;;247    {
;;;248        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
;;;249        u8 i;
;;;250    
;;;251        pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.bPowerOnSta = TRUE;
000002  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000004  700a              STRB     r2,[r1,#0]
;;;252    //    pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.bIsDebugEn = FALSE;
;;;253    
;;;254        for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)
000006  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000008  e056              B        |L9.184|
                  |L9.10|

00000e  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]

000012  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]

000016  1d12              ADDS     r2,r2,#4
000018  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]

00001c  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]
;;;260            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u8Brightness[i]     = 50;

000020  1d12              ADDS     r2,r2,#4
000022  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]
;;;261            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u8Contrast[i]       = 50;

000026  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]

000034  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]

000038  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]
;;;266            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u8PatternSta[i]     = 0;

00003c  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]
;;;267            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u8RedValue[i]       = 128;

000040  1d12              ADDS     r2,r2,#4
000042  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]
;;;268            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u8GreenValue[i]     = 128;

000046  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]
;;;269            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u8BlueValue[i]      = 128;
000048  1d12              ADDS     r2,r2,#4
00004a  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]
;;;270            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u16SplicerX[i]      = 0;
00004c  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
00004e  1d12              ADDS     r2,r2,#4
000050  eb020240          ADD      r2,r2,r0,LSL #1
000054  8013              STRH     r3,[r2,#0]
;;;271            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u16SplicerY[i]      = 0;

00005a  eb020240          ADD      r2,r2,r0,LSL #1
00005e  8013              STRH     r3,[r2,#0]
;;;272            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u16SplicerWidth[i]  = 0;

000078  5413              STRB     r3,[r2,r0]

000090  eb020240          ADD      r2,r2,r0,LSL #1
000094  8013              STRH     r3,[r2,#0]
;;;278            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u16BorderHeight[i]  = 0;

00009a  eb020240          ADD      r2,r2,r0,LSL #1
00009e  8013              STRH     r3,[r2,#0]
;;;279            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u16BorderSizeW[i]   = 0;

0000a4  eb020240          ADD      r2,r2,r0,LSL #1
0000a8  8013              STRH     r3,[r2,#0]
;;;280            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u16BorderSizeH[i]   = 0;

0000ae  eb020240          ADD      r2,r2,r0,LSL #1
0000b2  8013              STRH     r3,[r2,#0]

0000b6  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2                 ;254
                  |L9.184|
0000b8  2804              CMP      r0,#4                 ;254
0000ba  dba6              BLT      |L9.10|
;;;281        }
;;;282    }
0000bc  4770              BX       lr
;;;283    
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i.LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecCustomEdidVarDefault||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecCustomEdidVarDefault PROC
;;;283    
;;;284    void LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecCustomEdidVarDefault(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}

                          AREA ||i.LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecVarValidCheck||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecVarValidCheck PROC
;;;293    
;;;294    bool LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecVarValidCheck(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;295    {
;;;296        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
000002  4c4a              LDR      r4,|L11.300|
;;;297        bool                        isSpecVarValid = TRUE;
000004  2501              MOVS     r5,#1
;;;298    
;;;299        if(pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u8CheckSum != CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar,((uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u8CheckSum-(uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar)))
000006  f104008e          ADD      r0,r4,#0x8e
00000a  1b01              SUBS     r1,r0,r4
00000c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
000012  f894108e          LDRB     r1,[r4,#0x8e]
000016  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000018  d00a              BEQ      |L11.48|
;;;300        {
;;;301            LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecBasicVarDefault();
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecBasicVarDefault
;;;302            pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar,((uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar.u8CheckSum-(uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar));
00001e  f104008e          ADD      r0,r4,#0x8e
000022  1b01              SUBS     r1,r0,r4
000024  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000026  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate
00002a  f884008e          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x8e]
;;;303    
;;;304            isSpecVarValid = FALSE;
00002e  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
                  |L11.48|
;;;305        }
;;;306    
;;;307        if(pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre1.u8CheckSum != CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre1,((uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre1.u8CheckSum-(uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre1)))
000030  f204108f          ADD      r0,r4,#0x18f
000034  f104028f          ADD      r2,r4,#0x8f

00003c  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate

000044  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000046  d012              BEQ      |L11.110|
;;;308        {
;;;309            memcpy(pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre1.pu8EdidContext, System_Default_Edid_table, 256);
000048  f44f7280          MOV      r2,#0x100
00004c  4838              LDR      r0,|L11.304|
00004e  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]  ; System_Default_Edid_table

000054  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
;;;310            pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre1.u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre1,((uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre1.u8CheckSum-(uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre1));

;;;312            isSpecVarValid = FALSE;
00006c  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
                  |L11.110|
;;;313        }
;;;314    
;;;315        if(pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre2.u8CheckSum != CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre2,((uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre2.u8CheckSum-(uint8_t *)&pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre2)))

                  Project_STM32_SysFuncSel PROC
;;;288    
;;;289    void Project_STM32_SysFuncSel(iTE_u8 u8FuncKey)
000000  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;290    {
000002  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;291    //	pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t 	pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
;;;292    //	pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t	pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;

;;;294    //	pstBasicSpecVar_t		    pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
;;;295    
;;;296    	switch(u8FuncKey)
000004  2a01              CMP      r2,#1
000006  d100              BNE      |L15.10|
;;;297    	{
;;;298    		case emKeyFunc_Source:
;;;299    			break;
000008  e000              B        |L15.12|
                  |L15.10|
;;;300    		default:
;;;301    			break;
00000a  bf00              NOP      
                  |L15.12|
00000c  bf00              NOP                            ;299
;;;302    	}
;;;303    
;;;304        if(mapp_GetKeyFunctionNum()!=emKeyFunc_None)
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_GetKeyFunctionNum
000012  b110              CBZ      r0,|L15.26|
;;;305            mapp_SetKeyFunction(emKeyFunc_None);
000014  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000016  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_SetKeyFunction
                  |L15.26|
;;;306    }
00001a  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;307    
                          ENDP

                  SetUserData_SpecCustomEdid PROC

;;;355    void SetUserData_SpecCustomEdid(uint8_t u8CustomEdidIndex)

;;;363        pstEdidOp->u8CheckSum = CRC8Calculate((uint8_t *)pstEdidOp, ((uint8_t *)&pstEdidOp->u8CheckSum-(uint8_t *)pstEdidOp));

000022  f7fffffe          BL       CRC8Calculate

                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i.SystemVarInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  SystemVarInit PROC
;;;359    
;;;360    void SystemVarInit(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;361    {
;;;362    	SysSaveVarInit();
000002  f7fffffe          BL       SysSaveVarInit
;;;363        #if _EN_MAIN_TASK_EEPROM
;;;364    	EepromVarInit();
000006  f7fffffe          BL       EepromVarInit
;;;365        #else
;;;366        app_UserDataToDefault();
;;;367        #endif
;;;368    	PrjStatePowerOnInit();
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       LMX_4OUHS_C_PrjStatePowerOnInit
;;;369    
;;;370    	if(System_Default_Edid_table == NULL)
00000e  480f              LDR      r0,|L25.76|
000010  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]  ; System_Default_Edid_table
000012  b9b0              CBNZ     r0,|L25.66|
;;;371    	{
;;;372    	#if  _ENABLE_IT663XX_EDID_BITE
;;;373    		System_Default_Edid_table = (u8 *)edid_internal_9;
;;;374            memcpy(g_pu8It663xxEdidBuffer, System_Default_Edid_table,256);
;;;375    
;;;376    	#else
;;;377    		System_Default_Edid_table = (u8 *)AllPrjDefEdidTabl;
000014  480e              LDR      r0,|L25.80|
000016  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; AllPrjDefEdidTabl
000018  490c              LDR      r1,|L25.76|
00001a  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; System_Default_Edid_table
;;;378            memcpy(g_pu8It663xxEdidBuffer, System_Default_Edid_table,256);
00001c  f44f7280          MOV      r2,#0x100
000020  4608              MOV      r0,r1
000022  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]  ; System_Default_Edid_table
000024  480b              LDR      r0,|L25.84|
000026  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
;;;379    	#endif
;;;380            #if _ENABLE_EDID_SWITCH_A_SINGLE_CHANNEL
;;;381            {
;;;382                u8 i;
;;;383                for(i=0; i<_HDMI_INPUT_PORT_USED_NUMBER; i++)
00002a  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00002c  e006              B        |L25.60|
                  |L25.46|
;;;384                {
;;;385                    FillIT663xxEdidDataForSingleChannel(System_Default_Edid_table,i);
00002e  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000030  4806              LDR      r0,|L25.76|
000032  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]  ; System_Default_Edid_table
000034  f7fffffe          BL       FillIT663xxEdidDataForSingleChannel
000038  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;383
00003a  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;383
                  |L25.60|
00003c  2c04              CMP      r4,#4                 ;383
00003e  dbf6              BLT      |L25.46|
;;;386                }
;;;387            }
000040  bf00              NOP      
                  |L25.66|
;;;388            #endif
;;;389    	}
;;;390        #if _ENABLE_SYSTEM_RESET_DELAY_TIME
;;;391        g_bSysResetFlag = FALSE;
000042  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000044  4904              LDR      r1,|L25.88|
000046  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;392        #endif
;;;393    }
000048  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;394    
                          ENDP

00004a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L25.76|
                          DCD      System_Default_Edid_table
                  |L25.80|
                          DCD      AllPrjDefEdidTabl
                  |L25.84|
                          DCD      g_pu8It663xxEdidBuffer
                  |L25.88|
                          DCD      g_bSysResetFlag

                          AREA ||i.USER_printf||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  USER_printf PROC
;;;418    
;;;419    int USER_printf(const char *fmt, ...)
000000  b40f              PUSH     {r0-r3}
;;;420    {
000002  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
000004  b0c2              SUB      sp,sp,#0x108
;;;421    	int 				iret;
;;;422        char 				szPrint[256];
;;;423        va_list 			ap;
;;;424    
;;;425        //if(!g_bEnableRs232FeedBackFlag)
;;;426        //    return (0);
;;;427        va_start(ap, fmt);
000006  a845              ADD      r0,sp,#0x114
000008  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;428        iret = Uart_vsnprintf(szPrint, 256, fmt, ap);
00000a  f44f7180          MOV      r1,#0x100
00000e  a802              ADD      r0,sp,#8
000010  9b01              LDR      r3,[sp,#4]
000012  9a44              LDR      r2,[sp,#0x110]
000014  f7fffffe          BL       Uart_vsnprintf
000018  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;429        va_end(ap);
00001a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00001c  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;430    
;;;431    	uart2_send_bytes_A((uint8_t *)szPrint, iret,FALSE);
00001e  b2a1              UXTH     r1,r4
000020  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000022  a802              ADD      r0,sp,#8
000024  f7fffffe          BL       uart2_send_bytes_A
;;;432    //	uart3_send_bytes_A((uint8_t *)szPrint, iret,FALSE);
;;;433    
;;;434        return iret;
000028  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;435    }
00002a  b042              ADD      sp,sp,#0x108
00002c  bc10              POP      {r4}
00002e  f85dfb14          LDR      pc,[sp],#0x14
;;;436    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.Uart1ParserMethod||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  Uart1ParserMethod PROC
;;;48     
;;;49     void Uart1ParserMethod(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;50     {
;;;51         //add your response to uart message code
;;;52         //this function will be call in main loop
;;;53     	pstUartCom_t 			pUartCommVar = &g_stUart1CommVar;
000002  4c0a              LDR      r4,|L27.44|
;;;54     
;;;55         if(pUartCommVar->bRecCmdFlg)    // nomal command detect function
000004  7f20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
000006  b130              CBZ      r0,|L27.22|
;;;56         {
;;;57             mapp_UsartSystemCmdFun(pUartCommVar);
000008  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_UsartSystemCmdFun
;;;58     
;;;59             UartCommVarClear(pUartCommVar);
00000e  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000010  f7fffffe          BL       UartCommVarClear
000014  e008              B        |L27.40|
                  |L27.22|
;;;60         }
;;;61         else if(pUartCommVar->bIsMultiCmdDetect)    // multi command detect function
000016  f8940801          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x801]
00001a  b128              CBZ      r0,|L27.40|
;;;62         {
;;;63             mapp_MultiCmdMatchFunction(pUartCommVar);
00001c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_MultiCmdMatchFunction
;;;64     
;;;65             UartCommVarClear(pUartCommVar);
000022  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000024  f7fffffe          BL       UartCommVarClear
                  |L27.40|
;;;66         }
;;;67     }
000028  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;68     
                          ENDP

00002a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L27.44|
                          DCD      g_stUart1CommVar

                          AREA ||i.Uart1ProtocalDataReceive||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  Uart1ProtocalDataReceive PROC
;;;24     
;;;25     void Uart1ProtocalDataReceive(uint8_t u8RecChar)
000000  4601              MOV      r1,r0
;;;26     {
;;;27         pstUartCom_t pUartCommVar = &g_stUart1CommVar;
000002  480c              LDR      r0,|L28.52|
;;;28     
;;;29         //if(pUartCommVar->bRecCmdFlg) return;
;;;30     	if(pUartCommVar->u16RecCnt < (SIZE_UART_RECEIVE_CMD-1))
000004  8ac2              LDRH     r2,[r0,#0x16]
000006  f24043af          MOV      r3,#0x4af
00000a  429a              CMP      r2,r3
00000c  da04              BGE      |L28.24|
;;;31     	{
;;;32     		pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer[pUartCommVar->u16RecCnt++] = u8RecChar;
00000e  8ac2              LDRH     r2,[r0,#0x16]
000010  1c53              ADDS     r3,r2,#1
000012  82c3              STRH     r3,[r0,#0x16]
000014  6983              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x18]
000016  5499              STRB     r1,[r3,r2]
                  |L28.24|
;;;33     	}
;;;34     
;;;35     	#if _ENABLE_USER_EDID_LEARNING_FUNCTION
;;;36         if(StartEdidCostumFlag)
000018  4a07              LDR      r2,|L28.56|
00001a  7812              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0]  ; StartEdidCostumFlag
00001c  b122              CBZ      r2,|L28.40|
;;;37         {
;;;38             pUartCommVar->bTimeOutValid = TRUE;
00001e  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000020  7502              STRB     r2,[r0,#0x14]
;;;39             pUartCommVar->u32RecTimeout = (TIME_UART_RECEIVE_CMD_TIMEOUT_INVALID*4);
000022  22c8              MOVS     r2,#0xc8
000024  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
000026  e003              B        |L28.48|
                  |L28.40|
;;;40         }
;;;41         else
;;;42         #endif
;;;43     	{
;;;44     		pUartCommVar->bTimeOutValid = TRUE;
000028  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00002a  7502              STRB     r2,[r0,#0x14]
;;;45     		pUartCommVar->u32RecTimeout = TIME_UART_RECEIVE_CMD_TIMEOUT_VALID;
00002c  2205              MOVS     r2,#5
00002e  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L28.48|
;;;46     	}
;;;47     }
000030  4770              BX       lr
;;;48     
                          ENDP

000032  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L28.52|
                          DCD      g_stUart1CommVar
                  |L28.56|
                          DCD      StartEdidCostumFlag

                          AREA ||i.Uart1VarInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  Uart1VarInit PROC
;;;95     
;;;96     void Uart1VarInit(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;97     {
;;;98     	pstUartCom_t 	puart1CommVar = &g_stUart1CommVar;
000002  4c09              LDR      r4,|L29.40|
;;;99     
;;;100        #if _ENABLE_UART_SEMAPHORE_FUNCTION_BY_PRINT
;;;101        Uart1_xSemaphoreInit();
000004  f7fffffe          BL       Uart1_xSemaphoreInit
;;;102        #else
;;;103    	xSemaphore_Uart1Snd = xSemaphoreCreateMutex();
;;;104        #endif
;;;105    	memset(puart1CommVar, 0, sizeof(stUartCom_t));
000008  f6400104          MOV      r1,#0x804
00000c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr4
;;;106    
;;;107    	puart1CommVar->pRecBuffer = uart1_rec_buffer;
000012  4806              LDR      r0,|L29.44|
000014  61a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x18]
;;;108    
;;;109        puart1CommVar->SetBaudRate = uart1_set_baudrate;
000016  4806              LDR      r0,|L29.48|
000018  6020              STR      r0,[r4,#0]
;;;110        puart1CommVar->SendBytes = uart1_send_bytes_A;
00001a  4806              LDR      r0,|L29.52|
00001c  6060              STR      r0,[r4,#4]
;;;111        puart1CommVar->SendString = uart1_send_string_A;
00001e  4806              LDR      r0,|L29.56|
000020  60a0              STR      r0,[r4,#8]
;;;112    #if (_ENABLE_USER_PRINTF_FUNCTION==_MACRO_ENABLE)
;;;113        puart1CommVar->SendPrintf = Uart1_printf;
000022  4806              LDR      r0,|L29.60|
000024  60e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0xc]
;;;114    #endif
;;;115    }
000026  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;116    
                          ENDP

                  |L29.40|
                          DCD      g_stUart1CommVar
                  |L29.44|
                          DCD      uart1_rec_buffer
                  |L29.48|
                          DCD      uart1_set_baudrate
                  |L29.52|
                          DCD      uart1_send_bytes_A
                  |L29.56|
                          DCD      uart1_send_string_A
                  |L29.60|
                          DCD      Uart1_printf

                          AREA ||i.Uart1VarTimeOut||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  Uart1VarTimeOut PROC
;;;68     
;;;69     void Uart1VarTimeOut(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;70     {
;;;71     	pstUartCom_t		pGuiCommVar = &g_stUart1CommVar;
000002  4c0b              LDR      r4,|L30.48|
;;;72     
;;;73     	if(pGuiCommVar->u32RecTimeout > 0)
000004  6920              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x10]
000006  b190              CBZ      r0,|L30.46|
;;;74     	{
;;;75     		pGuiCommVar->u32RecTimeout --;
000008  6920              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x10]
00000a  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
00000c  6120              STR      r0,[r4,#0x10]
;;;76     		if(pGuiCommVar->u32RecTimeout == 0)
00000e  6920              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x10]
000010  b968              CBNZ     r0,|L30.46|
;;;77     		{
;;;78     			if(pGuiCommVar->bTimeOutValid)
000012  7d20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x14]
000014  b110              CBZ      r0,|L30.28|
;;;79     			{
;;;80     				{
;;;81     					pGuiCommVar->bRecCmdFlg = TRUE;
000016  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000018  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
00001a  e008              B        |L30.46|
                  |L30.28|
;;;82     				}
;;;83     			}
;;;84     			else
;;;85     			{
;;;86     				if(!pGuiCommVar->bRecCmdFlg)
00001c  7f20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
00001e  b930              CBNZ     r0,|L30.46|
;;;87     				{
;;;88     					memset(pGuiCommVar->pRecBuffer, 0, SIZE_UART_RECEIVE_CMD);
000020  f44f6196          MOV      r1,#0x4b0
000024  69a0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x18]
000026  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr
;;;89     					pGuiCommVar->u16RecCnt = 0;
00002a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00002c  82e0              STRH     r0,[r4,#0x16]
                  |L30.46|
;;;90     				}
;;;91     			}
;;;92     		}
;;;93     	}
;;;94     }
00002e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;95     
                          ENDP

                  |L30.48|
                          DCD      g_stUart1CommVar

                          AREA ||i.Uart2ParserMethod||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  Uart2ParserMethod PROC
;;;172    
;;;173    void Uart2ParserMethod(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;174    {
;;;175    	pstUartCom_t 			pUartCommVar = &g_stUart2CommVar;
000002  4c1a              LDR      r4,|L31.108|
;;;176    
;;;177        if(pUartCommVar->bRecCmdFlg)    // nomal command detect function
000004  7f20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
000006  b180              CBZ      r0,|L31.42|
;;;178        {
;;;179            if(strncmp(pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer,"M",strlen("M"))==0)
000008  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00000a  a119              ADR      r1,|L31.112|
00000c  69a0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x18]
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       strncmp
000012  b118              CBZ      r0,|L31.28|
;;;180            {
;;;181    //            dbg_printf("cmd1:%s\r\n",pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer);
;;;182            }
;;;183            else
;;;184            {
;;;185                dbg_printf("cmd:%s\r\n",pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer);
000014  a017              ADR      r0,|L31.116|
000016  69a1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x18]
000018  f7fffffe          BL       dbg_printf
                  |L31.28|
;;;186            }
;;;187            mapp_UsartSystemCmdFun(pUartCommVar);
00001c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_UsartSystemCmdFun
;;;188    
;;;189            UartCommVarClear(pUartCommVar);
000022  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000024  f7fffffe          BL       UartCommVarClear
000028  e008              B        |L31.60|
                  |L31.42|
;;;190        }
;;;191        else if(pUartCommVar->bIsMultiCmdDetect)    // multi command detect function
00002a  f8940801          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x801]
00002e  b128              CBZ      r0,|L31.60|
;;;192        {
;;;193            mapp_MultiCmdMatchFunction(pUartCommVar);
000030  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000032  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_MultiCmdMatchFunction
;;;194    
;;;195            UartCommVarClear(pUartCommVar);
000036  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000038  f7fffffe          BL       UartCommVarClear
                  |L31.60|
;;;196        }
;;;197    
;;;198    #if _ENABLE_USER_EDID_LEARNING_FUNCTION
;;;199        if(PlatformTimerGet(etUserEdidReceiveTime) == 0&&StartEdidCostumFlag)
00003c  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
00003e  f7fffffe          BL       PlatformTimerGet
000042  b948              CBNZ     r0,|L31.88|
000044  480e              LDR      r0,|L31.128|
000046  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; StartEdidCostumFlag
000048  b130              CBZ      r0,|L31.88|
;;;200        {
;;;201            StartEdidCostumFlag = FALSE;
00004a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00004c  490c              LDR      r1,|L31.128|
00004e  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;202            pUartCommVar->SendString("@TIMEOUT TO SEND EDID\r\n", TRUE);
000050  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000052  a00c              ADR      r0,|L31.132|
000054  68a2              LDR      r2,[r4,#8]
000056  4790              BLX      r2
                  |L31.88|
;;;203        }
;;;204    #endif
;;;205    
;;;206    
;;;207    #if _ENABLE_SYSTEM_RESET_DELAY_TIME
;;;208        if(mapp_GetSysResetMode()&&mapp_CheckAllDataHasSave())
000058  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_GetSysResetMode
00005c  b120              CBZ      r0,|L31.104|
00005e  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_CheckAllDataHasSave
000062  b108              CBZ      r0,|L31.104|
;;;209        {
;;;210            SYS_SoftReset();
000064  f7fffffe          BL       SYS_SoftReset
                  |L31.104|
;;;211        }
;;;212    #endif
;;;213    }
000068  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;214    
                          ENDP

00006a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L31.108|
                          DCD      g_stUart2CommVar
                  |L31.112|
000070  4d00              DCB      "M",0
000072  00                DCB      0
000073  00                DCB      0
                  |L31.116|
000074  636d643a          DCB      "cmd:%s\r\n",0
000078  25730d0a
00007c  00      
00007d  00                DCB      0
00007e  00                DCB      0
00007f  00                DCB      0
                  |L31.128|

                  |L31.132|

                          AREA ||i.Uart2ProtocalDataReceive||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  Uart2ProtocalDataReceive PROC
;;;139    
;;;140    void Uart2ProtocalDataReceive(uint8_t u8RecChar)
000000  4601              MOV      r1,r0
;;;141    {
;;;142    	pstUartCom_t pUartCommVar = &g_stUart2CommVar;
000002  4816              LDR      r0,|L32.92|
;;;143    
;;;144    	if(pUartCommVar->u16RecCnt < (SIZE_UART_RECEIVE_CMD-1))
000004  8ac2              LDRH     r2,[r0,#0x16]
000006  f24043af          MOV      r3,#0x4af
00000a  429a              CMP      r2,r3
00000c  da04              BGE      |L32.24|
;;;145    	{
;;;146    		pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer[pUartCommVar->u16RecCnt++] = u8RecChar;
00000e  8ac2              LDRH     r2,[r0,#0x16]
000010  1c53              ADDS     r3,r2,#1
000012  82c3              STRH     r3,[r0,#0x16]
000014  6983              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x18]
000016  5499              STRB     r1,[r3,r2]
                  |L32.24|
;;;147    	}
;;;148    
;;;149    #if _ENABLE_USER_EDID_LEARNING_FUNCTION
;;;150        if(StartEdidCostumFlag)
000018  4a11              LDR      r2,|L32.96|
00001a  7812              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0]  ; StartEdidCostumFlag
00001c  b122              CBZ      r2,|L32.40|
;;;151        {
;;;152            pUartCommVar->bTimeOutValid = TRUE;
00001e  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000020  7502              STRB     r2,[r0,#0x14]
;;;153            pUartCommVar->u32RecTimeout = (TIME_UART_RECEIVE_CMD_TIMEOUT_INVALID*4);
000022  22c8              MOVS     r2,#0xc8
000024  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
000026  e017              B        |L32.88|
                  |L32.40|
;;;154        }
;;;155        else
;;;156    #endif
;;;157        if((pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer[0]=='G')
000028  6982              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x18]
00002a  7812              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0]
00002c  2a47              CMP      r2,#0x47
00002e  d10f              BNE      |L32.80|
;;;158            &&(pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer[0]=='0')
000030  6982              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x18]
000032  7812              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0]
000034  2a30              CMP      r2,#0x30
000036  d10b              BNE      |L32.80|
;;;159            &&(pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer[pUartCommVar->u16RecCnt-1]=='.'))
000038  8ac2              LDRH     r2,[r0,#0x16]
00003a  6983              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x18]
00003c  1e52              SUBS     r2,r2,#1
00003e  5c9a              LDRB     r2,[r3,r2]
000040  2a2e              CMP      r2,#0x2e
000042  d105              BNE      |L32.80|
;;;160        {
;;;161    		pUartCommVar->bTimeOutValid = FALSE;
000044  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000046  7502              STRB     r2,[r0,#0x14]
;;;162    		pUartCommVar->u32RecTimeout = 0;
000048  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
;;;163            pUartCommVar->bRecCmdFlg = TRUE;
00004a  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00004c  7702              STRB     r2,[r0,#0x1c]
00004e  e003              B        |L32.88|
                  |L32.80|
;;;164        }
;;;165        else
;;;166        {
;;;167    		pUartCommVar->bTimeOutValid = TRUE;
000050  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000052  7502              STRB     r2,[r0,#0x14]
;;;168    		pUartCommVar->u32RecTimeout = TIME_UART_RECEIVE_CMD_TIMEOUT_VALID;
000054  2205              MOVS     r2,#5
000056  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L32.88|
;;;169    	}
;;;170    
;;;171    }
000058  4770              BX       lr
;;;172    
                          ENDP

00005a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L32.92|
                          DCD      g_stUart2CommVar
                  |L32.96|
                          DCD      StartEdidCostumFlag

                          AREA ||i.Uart2VarInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  Uart2VarInit PROC
;;;215    
;;;216    void Uart2VarInit(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;217    {
;;;218    	pstUartCom_t 	pUartCommVar = &g_stUart2CommVar;
000002  4c0c              LDR      r4,|L33.52|
;;;219    
;;;220        #if _ENABLE_UART_SEMAPHORE_FUNCTION_BY_PRINT
;;;221        Uart2_xSemaphoreInit();
000004  f7fffffe          BL       Uart2_xSemaphoreInit
;;;222        #else
;;;223    	xSemaphore_Uart2Snd = xSemaphoreCreateMutex();
;;;224        #endif
;;;225    
;;;226    	memset(pUartCommVar, 0, sizeof(stUartCom_t));
000008  f6400104          MOV      r1,#0x804
00000c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr4
;;;227    
;;;228    	pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer = uart2_rec_buffer;
000012  4809              LDR      r0,|L33.56|
000014  61a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x18]
;;;229    
;;;230    	pUartCommVar->SetBaudRate = uart2_set_baudrate;
000016  4809              LDR      r0,|L33.60|
000018  6020              STR      r0,[r4,#0]
;;;231    	pUartCommVar->SendBytes = uart2_send_bytes_A;
00001a  4809              LDR      r0,|L33.64|
00001c  6060              STR      r0,[r4,#4]
;;;232    	pUartCommVar->SendString = uart2_send_string_A;
00001e  4809              LDR      r0,|L33.68|
000020  60a0              STR      r0,[r4,#8]
;;;233    #if (_ENABLE_USER_PRINTF_FUNCTION==_MACRO_ENABLE)
;;;234        pUartCommVar->SendPrintf = USER_printf;
000022  4809              LDR      r0,|L33.72|
000024  60e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0xc]
;;;235    #endif
;;;236    
;;;237    #if _ENABLE_USER_EDID_LEARNING_FUNCTION
;;;238        StartEdidCostumFlag = FALSE;
000026  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000028  4908              LDR      r1,|L33.76|
00002a  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;239        g_u8UserEDIDIndex = 0;
00002c  4908              LDR      r1,|L33.80|
00002e  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;240    #endif
;;;241    }
000030  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;242    
                          ENDP

000032  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L33.52|
                          DCD      g_stUart2CommVar
                  |L33.56|

                          DCD      uart2_set_baudrate
                  |L33.64|

                  |L33.68|

                  |L33.72|
                          DCD      USER_printf
                  |L33.76|
                          DCD      StartEdidCostumFlag

                          AREA ||i.Uart2VarTimeout||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  Uart2VarTimeout PROC
;;;242    
;;;243    void Uart2VarTimeout(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;244    {
;;;245    	pstUartCom_t		pUartCommVar = &g_stUart2CommVar;
000002  4c0b              LDR      r4,|L34.48|
;;;246    
;;;247    	if(pUartCommVar->u32RecTimeout > 0)
000004  6920              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x10]
000006  b190              CBZ      r0,|L34.46|
;;;248    	{
;;;249    		pUartCommVar->u32RecTimeout --;
000008  6920              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x10]
00000a  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
00000c  6120              STR      r0,[r4,#0x10]
;;;250    		if(pUartCommVar->u32RecTimeout == 0)
00000e  6920              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x10]
000010  b968              CBNZ     r0,|L34.46|
;;;251    		{
;;;252    			if(pUartCommVar->bTimeOutValid)
000012  7d20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x14]
000014  b110              CBZ      r0,|L34.28|
;;;253    			{
;;;254    				{
;;;255    					pUartCommVar->bRecCmdFlg = TRUE;
000016  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000018  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
00001a  e008              B        |L34.46|
                  |L34.28|
;;;256    				}
;;;257    			}
;;;258    			else
;;;259    			{
;;;260    				if(!pUartCommVar->bRecCmdFlg)
00001c  7f20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
00001e  b930              CBNZ     r0,|L34.46|
;;;261    				{
;;;262    					memset(pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer, 0, SIZE_UART_RECEIVE_CMD);
000020  f44f6196          MOV      r1,#0x4b0
000024  69a0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x18]
000026  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr
;;;263    					pUartCommVar->u16RecCnt = 0;
00002a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00002c  82e0              STRH     r0,[r4,#0x16]
                  |L34.46|
;;;264    				}
;;;265    			}
;;;266    		}
;;;267    	}
;;;268    }
00002e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;269    
                          ENDP

                  |L34.48|
                          DCD      g_stUart2CommVar

                          AREA ||i.Uart3ParserMethod||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  Uart3ParserMethod PROC
;;;316    
;;;317    void Uart3ParserMethod(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;318    {
;;;319        //add your response to uart message code
;;;320        //this function will be call in main loop
;;;321    	pstUartCom_t 			pUartCommVar = &g_stUart3CommVar;
000002  4c0a              LDR      r4,|L35.44|
;;;322    
;;;323        if(pUartCommVar->bRecCmdFlg)    // nomal command detect function
000004  7f20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
000006  b130              CBZ      r0,|L35.22|
;;;324        {
;;;325            mapp_UsartSystemCmdFun(pUartCommVar);
000008  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_UsartSystemCmdFun
;;;326    
;;;327            UartCommVarClear(pUartCommVar);
00000e  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000010  f7fffffe          BL       UartCommVarClear
000014  e008              B        |L35.40|
                  |L35.22|
;;;328        }
;;;329        else if(pUartCommVar->bIsMultiCmdDetect)    // multi command detect function
000016  f8940801          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x801]
00001a  b128              CBZ      r0,|L35.40|
;;;330        {
;;;331            mapp_MultiCmdMatchFunction(pUartCommVar);
00001c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_MultiCmdMatchFunction
;;;332    
;;;333            UartCommVarClear(pUartCommVar);
000022  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000024  f7fffffe          BL       UartCommVarClear
                  |L35.40|
;;;334        }
;;;335    }
000028  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;336    
                          ENDP

00002a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L35.44|
                          DCD      g_stUart3CommVar

                          AREA ||i.Uart3ProtocalDataReceive||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  Uart3ProtocalDataReceive PROC
;;;292    
;;;293    void Uart3ProtocalDataReceive(uint8_t u8RecChar)
000000  4601              MOV      r1,r0
;;;294    {
;;;295    	pstUartCom_t pUartCommVar = &g_stUart3CommVar;
000002  480c              LDR      r0,|L36.52|
;;;296    
;;;297    	//if(pUartCommVar->bRecCmdFlg) return;
;;;298    	if(pUartCommVar->u16RecCnt < (SIZE_UART_RECEIVE_CMD-1))
000004  8ac2              LDRH     r2,[r0,#0x16]
000006  f24043af          MOV      r3,#0x4af
00000a  429a              CMP      r2,r3
00000c  da04              BGE      |L36.24|
;;;299    	{
;;;300    		pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer[pUartCommVar->u16RecCnt++] = u8RecChar;
00000e  8ac2              LDRH     r2,[r0,#0x16]
000010  1c53              ADDS     r3,r2,#1
000012  82c3              STRH     r3,[r0,#0x16]
000014  6983              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x18]
000016  5499              STRB     r1,[r3,r2]
                  |L36.24|
;;;301    	}
;;;302    
;;;303        #if _ENABLE_USER_EDID_LEARNING_FUNCTION
;;;304        if(StartEdidCostumFlag)
000018  4a07              LDR      r2,|L36.56|
00001a  7812              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0]  ; StartEdidCostumFlag
00001c  b122              CBZ      r2,|L36.40|
;;;305        {
;;;306            pUartCommVar->bTimeOutValid = TRUE;
00001e  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000020  7502              STRB     r2,[r0,#0x14]
;;;307            pUartCommVar->u32RecTimeout = (TIME_UART_RECEIVE_CMD_TIMEOUT_INVALID*4);
000022  22c8              MOVS     r2,#0xc8
000024  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
000026  e003              B        |L36.48|
                  |L36.40|
;;;308        }
;;;309        else
;;;310        #endif
;;;311        {
;;;312    		pUartCommVar->bTimeOutValid = TRUE;
000028  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00002a  7502              STRB     r2,[r0,#0x14]
;;;313    		pUartCommVar->u32RecTimeout = TIME_UART_RECEIVE_CMD_TIMEOUT_INVALID;
00002c  2232              MOVS     r2,#0x32
00002e  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L36.48|
;;;314    	}
;;;315    }
000030  4770              BX       lr
;;;316    
                          ENDP

000032  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L36.52|
                          DCD      g_stUart3CommVar
                  |L36.56|
                          DCD      StartEdidCostumFlag

                  UartCommVarClear PROC

;;;414    	pCommVar->u16RecCnt = 0;

;;;415    	memset(pCommVar->pRecBuffer, 0, SIZE_UART_RECEIVE_CMD);

;;;417    }

;;;418    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.app_GetCmdResolutionID||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  app_GetCmdResolutionID PROC
;;;2213   
;;;2214   u8 app_GetCmdResolutionID(u8 u8ResID)
000000  4601              MOV      r1,r0
;;;2215   {
;;;2216       switch(u8ResID)
000002  290f              CMP      r1,#0xf
000004  d227              BCS      |L40.86|
000006  e8dff001          TBB      [pc,r1]
00000a  080a              DCB      0x08,0x0a
00000c  0c0e1012          DCB      0x0c,0x0e,0x10,0x12
000010  1416181a          DCB      0x14,0x16,0x18,0x1a
000014  1c1e2022          DCB      0x1c,0x1e,0x20,0x22
000018  2400              DCB      0x24,0x00
;;;2217       {
;;;2218           case emRes_1920x1200_60:
;;;2219               return 37;
00001a  2025              MOVS     r0,#0x25
                  |L40.28|
;;;2220           case emRes_1920x1080_60:
;;;2221               return 13;
;;;2222           case emRes_1280x720_60:
;;;2223               return 4;
;;;2224           case emRes_1360x768_60:
;;;2225               return 28;
;;;2226           case emRes_1280x1024_60:
;;;2227               return 26;
;;;2228           case emRes_1024x768_60:
;;;2229               return 24;
;;;2230           case emRes_1600x1200_60:
;;;2231               return 31;
;;;2232           case emRes_1440x900_60:
;;;2233               return 32;
;;;2234           case emRes_1600x900_60:
;;;2235               return 39;
;;;2236           case emRes_1280x720_50:
;;;2237               return 6;
;;;2238           case emRes_1920x1080_50:
;;;2239               return 15;
;;;2240           case emRes_1920x1080_30:
;;;2241               return 16;
;;;2242           case emRes_1920x1080_25:
;;;2243               return 18;
;;;2244           case emRes_3840x2160_30:
;;;2245               return 40;
;;;2246           #if _ENABLE_RES_4096x2160_30
;;;2247           case emRes_4096x2160_30:
;;;2248               return 44;
;;;2249           #endif
;;;2250           default:
;;;2251               return 0xFF;
;;;2252       }
;;;2253   }
00001c  4770              BX       lr
00001e  200d              MOVS     r0,#0xd               ;2221
000020  e7fc              B        |L40.28|
000022  2004              MOVS     r0,#4                 ;2223
000024  e7fa              B        |L40.28|
000026  201c              MOVS     r0,#0x1c              ;2225
000028  e7f8              B        |L40.28|
00002a  201a              MOVS     r0,#0x1a              ;2227
00002c  e7f6              B        |L40.28|
00002e  2018              MOVS     r0,#0x18              ;2229
000030  e7f4              B        |L40.28|
000032  201f              MOVS     r0,#0x1f              ;2231
000034  e7f2              B        |L40.28|
000036  2020              MOVS     r0,#0x20              ;2233
000038  e7f0              B        |L40.28|
00003a  2027              MOVS     r0,#0x27              ;2235
00003c  e7ee              B        |L40.28|
00003e  2006              MOVS     r0,#6                 ;2237
000040  e7ec              B        |L40.28|
000042  200f              MOVS     r0,#0xf               ;2239
000044  e7ea              B        |L40.28|
000046  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10              ;2241
000048  e7e8              B        |L40.28|
00004a  2012              MOVS     r0,#0x12              ;2243
00004c  e7e6              B        |L40.28|
00004e  2028              MOVS     r0,#0x28              ;2245
000050  e7e4              B        |L40.28|
000052  202c              MOVS     r0,#0x2c              ;2248
000054  e7e2              B        |L40.28|
                  |L40.86|
000056  20ff              MOVS     r0,#0xff              ;2251
000058  e7e0              B        |L40.28|
;;;2254   void app_Type1CmdFunction(u8 u8Port,u8 u8Cmd)
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.app_LMX_4OUHS_CMS1826UserInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_LMX_4OUHS_CMS1826UserInit PROC
;;;433    
;;;434    void app_LMX_4OUHS_CMS1826UserInit(void)
000000  e92d43f8          PUSH     {r3-r9,lr}
;;;435    {
;;;436        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
000004  4f42              LDR      r7,|L41.272|
;;;437        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000006  463d              MOV      r5,r7
;;;438        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
000008  f8df8108          LDR      r8,|L41.276|
;;;439        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
00000c  46c1              MOV      r9,r8
;;;440        u8 i,l_u8Port;
;;;441    
;;;442        for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)
00000e  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000010  e079              B        |L41.262|
                  |L41.18|
;;;443        {
;;;444            l_u8Port = (u8)cg_u8ChannelTable[pstPrjSaveVar->stHdmiSel.u8SwChannel[i]][1];
000012  f1090004          ADD      r0,r9,#4
000016  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000018  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1
00001c  493e              LDR      r1,|L41.280|
00001e  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1
000020  7846              LDRB     r6,[r0,#1]
;;;445            app_MS1826Switch(0,l_u8Port,i);
000022  4622              MOV      r2,r4
000024  4631              MOV      r1,r6
000026  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000028  f7fffffe          BL       app_MS1826Switch
;;;446            app_MS1826TxResolutionChange(0,i,pstBasicVar->u8TxResolutionID[i]);
00002c  1ca8              ADDS     r0,r5,#2
00002e  5d02              LDRB     r2,[r0,r4]
000030  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000032  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000034  f7fffffe          BL       app_MS1826TxResolutionChange
;;;447            app_MS1826TxConfig(0,i,pstBasicVar->u8TxFormatSta[i]);
000038  1da8              ADDS     r0,r5,#6
00003a  5d02              LDRB     r2,[r0,r4]
00003c  4621              MOV      r1,r4
00003e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000040  f7fffffe          BL       app_MS1826TxConfig
;;;448    //        app_MS1826TxHdcpEnable(0,i,pstBasicVar->u8TxHdcpMode[i]);       //no hdcp key
;;;449

                          AREA ||i.app_LMX_4OUHS_CSetSplicerDisplay||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_LMX_4OUHS_CSetSplicerDisplay PROC
;;;498    
;;;499    void app_LMX_4OUHS_CSetSplicerDisplay(u8 u8Tx,u8 u8H,u8 u8W,u8 u8Index)
000000  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;500    {
000004  b085              SUB      sp,sp,#0x14
000006  4604              MOV      r4,r0

00000a  4617              MOV      r7,r2
00000c  4699              MOV      r9,r3
;;;501        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
00000e  4864              LDR      r0,|L44.416|
000010  9004              STR      r0,[sp,#0x10]
;;;502        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000012  9d04              LDR      r5,[sp,#0x10]
;;;503    //    stTimingTable_t l_stRxTming;
;;;504        u16 l_u16HDisp;
;;;505        u16 l_u16VDisp;
;;;506        u16 l_u16X;
;;;507        u16 l_u16Y;
;;;508        u16 l_u16W;
;;;509        u16 l_u16H;
;;;510        if(u8Index>=(u8H*u8W)||u8H==0||u8W==0)
000014  fb06f007          MUL      r0,r6,r7
000018  4548              CMP      r0,r9
00001a  dd01              BLE      |L44.32|
00001c  b106              CBZ      r6,|L44.32|
00001e  b917              CBNZ     r7,|L44.38|
                  |L44.32|
;;;511            return;
;;;512    
;;;513        l_u16HDisp = app_ms1826_get_display_horizontal(0,cg_u8ChannelTable[u8Tx][0]);
;;;514        l_u16VDisp = app_ms1826_get_display_vertical(0,cg_u8ChannelTable[u8Tx][0]);
;;;515    
;;;516        if(l_u16HDisp>1920)
;;;517            l_u16HDisp = 1920;
;;;518        if(l_u16VDisp>1080)
;;;519            l_u16VDisp = 1080;
;;;520    
;;;521        l_u16X  = (l_u16HDisp/u8H)*(u8Index%u8H);
;;;522        l_u16Y  = (l_u16VDisp/u8W)*(u8Index/u8W);
;;;523        l_u16W  = l_u16HDisp/u8H;
;;;524        l_u16H  = l_u16VDisp/u8W;
;;;525        pstBasicVar->u16SplicerX[u8Tx]      = l_u16X;
;;;526        pstBasicVar->u16SplicerY[u8Tx]      = l_u16Y;
;;;527        pstBasicVar->u16SplicerWidth[u8Tx]  = l_u16W;
;;;528        pstBasicVar->u16SplicerHeight[u8Tx] = l_u16H;
;;;529        pstBasicVar->bSplicerEnable[u8Tx]   = TRUE;
;;;530        dbg_printf("Splicer x = %d\r\n",pstBasicVar->u16SplicerX[u8Tx]);
;;;531        dbg_printf("Splicer y = %d\r\n",pstBasicVar->u16SplicerY[u8Tx]);
;;;532        dbg_printf("Splicer w = %d\r\n",pstBasicVar->u16SplicerWidth[u8Tx]);
;;;533        dbg_printf("Splicer h = %d\r\n",pstBasicVar->u16SplicerHeight[u8Tx]);
;;;534    
;;;535        l_u16X += pstBasicVar->u16BorderX[u8Tx];
;;;536        l_u16Y += pstBasicVar->u16BorderY[u8Tx];
;;;537        l_u16W -= pstBasicVar->u16BorderWidth[u8Tx];
;;;538        l_u16H -= pstBasicVar->u16BorderHeight[u8Tx];
;;;539        dbg_printf("Border x = %d\r\n",pstBasicVar->u16BorderX[u8Tx]);
;;;540        dbg_printf("Border y = %d\r\n",pstBasicVar->u16BorderY[u8Tx]);
;;;541        dbg_printf("Border w = %d\r\n",pstBasicVar->u16BorderWidth[u8Tx]);
;;;542        dbg_printf("Border h = %d\r\n",pstBasicVar->u16BorderHeight[u8Tx]);
;;;543    
;;;544        app_LMX_4OUHS_CSetSplicerPixelDisplay(u8Tx,l_u16X,l_u16Y,l_u16W,l_u16H);
;;;545    
;;;546        SetUserData_SpecBasicVar();
;;;547    }

                  |L44.38|

000034  4682              MOV      r10,r0                ;513

                          AREA ||i.app_LMX_4OUHS_CSetSplicerPixelDisplay||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_LMX_4OUHS_CSetSplicerPixelDisplay PROC
;;;471    
;;;472    void app_LMX_4OUHS_CSetSplicerPixelDisplay(u8 u8Tx,u16 u16X,u16 u16Y,u16 u16Width,u16 u16Height)
000000  e92d5ffc          PUSH     {r2-r12,lr}
;;;473    {
000004  4680              MOV      r8,r0
000006  460c              MOV      r4,r1
000008  4615              MOV      r5,r2
00000a  461e              MOV      r6,r3
00000c  9f0c              LDR      r7,[sp,#0x30]
;;;474        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
00000e  f8df90b4          LDR      r9,|L45.196|
;;;475        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000012  46ca              MOV      r10,r9
;;;476        u8 l_u8Port = (u8)cg_u8ChannelTable[u8Tx][0];
000014  eb080048          ADD      r0,r8,r8,LSL #1
000018  492b              LDR      r1,|L45.200|
00001a  f811b000          LDRB     r11,[r1,r0]
;;;477    
;;;478        if(u16X%8)
00001e  17e1              ASRS     r1,r4,#31
000020  eb047151          ADD      r1,r4,r1,LSR #29
000024  10c9              ASRS     r1,r1,#3
000026  eba401c1          SUB      r1,r4,r1,LSL #3
00002a  b141              CBZ      r1,|L45.62|
;;;479        {
;;;480            u16X -= u16X%8;
00002c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00002e  17e1              ASRS     r1,r4,#31
000030  eb047151          ADD      r1,r4,r1,LSR #29
000034  10c9              ASRS     r1,r1,#3
000036  eba401c1          SUB      r1,r4,r1,LSL #3
00003a  1a61              SUBS     r1,r4,r1
00003c  b28c              UXTH     r4,r1
                  |L45.62|
;;;481        }
;;;482        if(u16Y%8)
00003e  17e9              ASRS     r1,r5,#31
000040  eb057151          ADD      r1,r5,r1,LSR #29
000044  10c9              ASRS     r1,r1,#3
000046  eba501c1          SUB      r1,r5,r1,LSL #3
00004a  b141              CBZ      r1,|L45.94|
;;;483        {
;;;484            u16Y -= u16Y%8;
00004c  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00004e  17e9              ASRS     r1,r5,#31
000050  eb057151          ADD      r1,r5,r1,LSR #29
000054  10c9              ASRS     r1,r1,#3
000056  eba501c1          SUB      r1,r5,r1,LSL #3
00005a  1a69              SUBS     r1,r5,r1
00005c  b28d              UXTH     r5,r1
                  |L45.94|
;;;485        }
;;;486        if(u16Width%8)
00005e  17f1              ASRS     r1,r6,#31
000060  eb067151          ADD      r1,r6,r1,LSR #29
000064  10c9              ASRS     r1,r1,#3
000066  eba601c1          SUB      r1,r6,r1,LSL #3
00006a  b141              CBZ      r1,|L45.126|
;;;487        {
;;;488            u16Width -= u16Width%8;
00006c  4630              MOV      r0,r6
00006e  17f1              ASRS     r1,r6,#31
000070  eb067151          ADD      r1,r6,r1,LSR #29
000074  10c9              ASRS     r1,r1,#3
000076  eba601c1          SUB      r1,r6,r1,LSL #3
00007a  1a71              SUBS     r1,r6,r1
00007c  b28e              UXTH     r6,r1
                  |L45.126|
;;;489        }
;;;490        if(u16Height%8)
00007e  17f9              ASRS     r1,r7,#31
000080  eb077151          ADD      r1,r7,r1,LSR #29
000084  10c9              ASRS     r1,r1,#3
000086  eba701c1          SUB      r1,r7,r1,LSL #3
00008a  b141              CBZ      r1,|L45.158|
;;;491        {
;;;492            u16Height -= u16Height%8;
00008c  4638              MOV      r0,r7
00008e  17f9              ASRS     r1,r7,#31
000090  eb077151          ADD      r1,r7,r1,LSR #29
000094  10c9              ASRS     r1,r1,#3
000096  eba701c1          SUB      r1,r7,r1,LSL #3
00009a  1a79              SUBS     r1,r7,r1
00009c  b28f              UXTH     r7,r1
                  |L45.158|
;;;493        }
;;;494    
;;;495        app_MS1826SplicerEnable(0,l_u8Port,pstBasicVar->bSplicerEnable[u8Tx]);
00009e  f10a005a          ADD      r0,r10,#0x5a
0000a2  f8102008          LDRB     r2,[r0,r8]
0000a6  4659              MOV      r1,r11
0000a8  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
0000aa  f7fffffe          BL       app_MS1826SplicerEnable
;;;496        app_MS1826SplicerConfig(0,l_u8Port,u16X,u16Y,u16Width,u16Height);
0000ae  462b              MOV      r3,r5
0000b0  4622              MOV      r2,r4
0000b2  4659              MOV      r1,r11
0000b4  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
0000b6  e9cd6700          STRD     r6,r7,[sp,#0]
0000ba  f7fffffe          BL       app_MS1826SplicerConfig
;;;497    }
0000be  e8bd9ffc          POP      {r2-r12,pc}
;;;498    
                          ENDP

0000c2  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L45.196|
                          DCD      stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar
                  |L45.200|

                          AREA ||i.app_SplicerCmdFunction||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_SplicerCmdFunction PROC
;;;2479   
;;;2480   void app_SplicerCmdFunction(u8 u8Port,char* pu8Cmd)
000000  e92d47fc          PUSH     {r2-r10,lr}
;;;2481   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;2482       pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
000008  f8dfa470          LDR      r10,|L46.1148|
;;;2483       pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
00000c  46d0              MOV      r8,r10
;;;2484       u8 l_u8X=0;
00000e  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;2485       u8 l_u8Y=0;
000010  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
;;;2486       u8 l_u8Index=0;
000012  46b1              MOV      r9,r6
;;;2487   
;;;2488       if((*(pu8Cmd)=='A')&&((*(pu8Cmd+1)=='L')||(*(pu8Cmd+1)=='L')))
000014  7828              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0]
000016  2841              CMP      r0,#0x41
000018  d105              BNE      |L46.38|
00001a  7868              LDRB     r0,[r5,#1]
00001c  284c              CMP      r0,#0x4c
00001e  d010              BEQ      |L46.66|
000020  7868              LDRB     r0,[r5,#1]
000022  284c              CMP      r0,#0x4c
000024  d00d              BEQ      |L46.66|
                  |L46.38|
;;;2489       {
;;;2490           ;
;;;2491       }
;;;2492       else if((*(pu8Cmd+1)<'1')||(*(pu8Cmd+1)>'9')||(*(pu8Cmd+2)<'1')||(*(pu8Cmd+2)>'9'))
000026  7868              LDRB     r0,[r5,#1]
000028  2831              CMP      r0,#0x31
00002a  db08              BLT      |L46.62|
00002c  7868              LDRB     r0,[r5,#1]
00002e  2839              CMP      r0,#0x39
000030  dc05              BGT      |L46.62|
000032  78a8              LDRB     r0,[r5,#2]
000034  2831              CMP      r0,#0x31
000036  db02              BLT      |L46.62|
000038  78a8              LDRB     r0,[r5,#2]
00003a  2839              CMP      r0,#0x39
00003c  dd01              BLE      |L46.66|
                  |L46.62|
;;;2493           return;
;;;2494   
;;;2495       switch(*(pu8Cmd))
;;;2496       {
;;;2497           case 'A':    // full screen
;;;2498               {
;;;2499                   if(((*(pu8Cmd+1)=='L')&&(*(pu8Cmd+2)=='L'))||((*(pu8Cmd+1)=='1')&&(*(pu8Cmd+2)=='1')))
;;;2500                   {
;;;2501                       //close splicer mode

                          AREA ||i.app_SwitchResolution||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_SwitchResolution PROC
;;;1953   
;;;1954   bool app_SwitchResolution(u8 u8Tx,u8 u8ResID)
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;1955   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460f              MOV      r7,r1
;;;1956       bool l_bRetVal = FALSE;
000008  f04f0900          MOV      r9,#0
;;;1957       pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
00000c  f8dfa370          LDR      r10,|L47.896|
;;;1958       pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000010  4655              MOV      r5,r10
;;;1959       u8 l_u8RealPort = cg_u8ChannelTable[u8Tx-1][0]+1;
000012  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
000014  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1
000018  49da              LDR      r1,|L47.900|
00001a  5c08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r0]
00001c  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
00001e  b2c6              UXTB     r6,r0
;;;1960   
;;;1961       switch(u8ResID)
000020  2f2d              CMP      r7,#0x2d
000022  d275              BCS      |L47.272|
000024  e8dff007          TBB      [pc,r7]
000028  171a1d20          DCB      0x17,0x1a,0x1d,0x20
00002c  23373a4e          DCB      0x23,0x37,0x3a,0x4e
000030  5154575a          DCB      0x51,0x54,0x57,0x5a
000034  5d607578          DCB      0x5d,0x60,0x75,0x78
000038  8ca0a3b7          DCB      0x8c,0xa0,0xa3,0xb7
00003c  babdc0c3          DCB      0xba,0xbd,0xc0,0xc3
000040  c6daddfd          DCB      0xc6,0xda,0xdd,0xfd
000044  fcfbfaf9          DCB      0xfc,0xfb,0xfa,0xf9
000048  f8f7f6f5          DCB      0xf8,0xf7,0xf6,0xf5
00004c  f4f3f2f1          DCB      0xf4,0xf3,0xf2,0xf1
000050  f0747474          DCB      0xf0,0x74,0x74,0x74
000054  ef00              DCB      0xef,0x00
;;;1962       {
;;;1963           case 0:     //720x480i60
;;;1964               {
;;;1965                   l_bRetVal = TRUE;

;;;1966               }
;;;1967               break;

;;;1968           case 1:     //720x576i50
;;;1969               {
;;;1970                   l_bRetVal = TRUE;

;;;1972               break;

;;;1976               }
;;;1977               break;

;;;1978           case 3:     //720x576p50
;;;1979               {
;;;1980                   l_bRetVal = TRUE;

;;;1981               }
;;;1982               break;

;;;1983           case 4:     //1280x720p60
;;;1984               {
;;;1985                   l_bRetVal = TRUE;

;;;1986                   pstBasicVar->u8TxResolutionID[u8Tx-1] = emRes_1280x720_60;

;;;1987                   app_MS1826TxResolutionChange(0,(l_u8RealPort-1)%4,emRes_1280x720_60);

00007e  ea4f70e8          ASR      r0,r8,#31
000082  eb087090          ADD      r0,r8,r0,LSR #30

                  app_Type1CmdFunction PROC
;;;2253   }
;;;2254   void app_Type1CmdFunction(u8 u8Port,u8 u8Cmd)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;2255   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460f              MOV      r7,r1
;;;2256       pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
000008  f8df8218          LDR      r8,|L48.548|
;;;2257       pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
00000c  4645              MOV      r5,r8
;;;2258       u8 l_u8RealPort = cg_u8ChannelTable[u8Port-1][0]+1;
00000e  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
000010  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1
000014  4984              LDR      r1,|L48.552|
000016  5c08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r0]
000018  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
00001a  b2c6              UXTB     r6,r0
;;;2259   
;;;2260       switch(u8Cmd)
00001c  1ef8              SUBS     r0,r7,#3
00001e  2811              CMP      r0,#0x11
000020  d274              BCS      |L48.268|
000022  e8dff000          TBB      [pc,r0]
000026  091d              DCB      0x09,0x1d
000028  fa3147fa          DCB      0xfa,0x31,0x47,0xfa
00002c  fa5d748a          DCB      0xfa,0x5d,0x74,0x8a
000030  95fafaa0          DCB      0x95,0xfa,0xfa,0xa0
000034  bddaea00          DCB      0xbd,0xda,0xea,0x00
;;;2261       {
;;;2262           case 3:
;;;2263               pstBasicVar->u8TxFormatSta[u8Port-1] = 1;

00003c  1da9              ADDS     r1,r5,#6
00003e  540a              STRB     r2,[r1,r0]
;;;2264               dbg_printf("output hdmi %d format is %s\r\n",u8Port,"hdmi");

000042  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000044  a07b              ADR      r0,|L48.564|
000046  f7fffffe          BL       dbg_printf
;;;2265               app_MS1826TxConfig(0,l_u8RealPort-1,pstBasicVar->u8TxFormatSta[u8Port-1]);

;;;2266               SetUserData_SpecBasicVar();

;;;2267               break;

;;;2268           case 4:
;;;2269               pstBasicVar->u8TxFormatSta[u8Port-1] = 0;

                          AREA ||i.app_Type4CmdFunction||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_Type4CmdFunction PROC
;;;2341   
;;;2342   void app_Type4CmdFunction(u8 u8Port,u8 u8Cmd)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;2343   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460f              MOV      r7,r1
;;;2344       pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
000008  f8df81bc          LDR      r8,|L49.456|
;;;2345       pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
00000c  4645              MOV      r5,r8
;;;2346       u8 l_u8RealPort = cg_u8ChannelTable[u8Port-1][0]+1;
00000e  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
000010  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1
000014  496d              LDR      r1,|L49.460|
000016  5c08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r0]
000018  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
00001a  b2c6              UXTB     r6,r0
;;;2347   
;;;2348       switch(u8Cmd)
00001c  2f0b              CMP      r7,#0xb
00001e  d06b              BEQ      |L49.248|
000020  dc05              BGT      |L49.46|
000022  b14f              CBZ      r7,|L49.56|
000024  2f01              CMP      r7,#1
000026  d027              BEQ      |L49.120|
000028  2f0a              CMP      r7,#0xa
                  |L49.42|
00002a  d17d              BNE      |L49.296|
00002c  e044              B        |L49.184|
                  |L49.46|
00002e  2f14              CMP      r7,#0x14
000030  d07b              BEQ      |L49.298|
000032  2f15              CMP      r7,#0x15
000034  d1f9              BNE      |L49.42|
000036  e0a2              B        |L49.382|
                  |L49.56|
;;;2349       {
;;;2350           case 0:
;;;2351               if(pstBasicVar->u8Brightness[u8Port-1]>0)
000038  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
00003a  f1050112          ADD      r1,r5,#0x12
00003e  5c08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r0]
000040  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000042  dd05              BLE      |L49.80|
;;;2352                   pstBasicVar->u8Brightness[u8Port-1]--;
000044  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
000046  5c08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r0]
000048  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
00004a  b2c2              UXTB     r2,r0
00004c  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
00004e  540a              STRB     r2,[r1,r0]

;;;2353               dbg_printf("output %d brightness %d\r\n",u8Port,pstBasicVar->u8Brightness[u8Port-1]);
000050  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
000052  f1050112          ADD      r1,r5,#0x12
000056  5c0a              LDRB     r2,[r1,r0]
000058  4621              MOV      r1,r4
00005a  a05d              ADR      r0,|L49.464|
00005c  f7fffffe          BL       dbg_printf
;;;2354               app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust(l_u8RealPort-1,pstBasicVar->u8Brightness[u8Port-1],MS1826_ADJUST_BRIGHTNESS);

000062  f1050312          ADD      r3,r5,#0x12
000066  5c99              LDRB     r1,[r3,r2]
000068  1e72              SUBS     r2,r6,#1
00006a  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
00006c  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00006e  f7fffffe          BL       app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust
;;;2355               SetUserData_SpecBasicVar();
000072  f7fffffe          BL       SetUserData_SpecBasicVar
;;;2356               break;
000076  e0a3              B        |L49.448|
                  |L49.120|
;;;2357           case 1:
;;;2358               if(pstBasicVar->u8Brightness[u8Port-1]<100)

000248  a00b              ADR      r0,|L50.632|

                  |L50.592|

                  mapp_CmdfuncBypassSwitchPort PROC
;;;1671   //eFunc_BypassSwitchPort
;;;1672   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncBypassSwitchPort(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d4ffe          PUSH     {r1-r11,lr}
;;;1673   {
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000006  4689              MOV      r9,r1
;;;1674       emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000a  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
;;;1675       u8 i=0,j=0,l_u8NumLen=0;
00000c  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00000e  f04f0a00          MOV      r10,#0
000012  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0
;;;1676       char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000016  4946              LDR      r1,|L52.304|
000018  eb011109          ADD      r1,r1,r9,LSL #4
00001c  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
000022  69b9              LDR      r1,[r7,#0x18]
000024  1846              ADDS     r6,r0,r1
;;;1677       char l_s8Input,l_s8Output[Def_outport_num],l_s8Temp;
;;;1678       u8 l_u8RealPort;
;;;1679   
;;;1680       memset(l_s8Output,0,Def_outport_num);
000026  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000028  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;1681   
;;;1682       l_s8Input = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
00002a  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00002c  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
00002e  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000030  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
000034  f0000bff          AND      r11,r0,#0xff
;;;1683       l_u8NumLen = GetLenOfStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000038  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00003a  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
00003c  4630              MOV      r0,r6
00003e  f7fffffe          BL       GetLenOfStr
000042  4680              MOV      r8,r0
;;;1684       l_pCmd = l_pCmd+l_u8NumLen+1;
000044  eb060008          ADD      r0,r6,r8
000048  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
;;;1685       do
00004a  bf00              NOP      
                  |L52.76|
;;;1686       {
;;;1687           if(*l_pCmd == 'a')
00004c  7830              LDRB     r0,[r6,#0]
00004e  2861              CMP      r0,#0x61
000050  d108              BNE      |L52.100|
;;;1688           {
;;;1689               for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)
000052  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000054  e003              B        |L52.94|
                  |L52.86|
;;;1690               {
;;;1691                   l_s8Output[i] = i;
000056  a801              ADD      r0,sp,#4
000058  5504              STRB     r4,[r0,r4]
00005a  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;1689
00005c  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;1689
                  |L52.94|
00005e  2c04              CMP      r4,#4                 ;1689
000060  dbf9              BLT      |L52.86|
;;;1692               }
;;;1693               break;
000062  e036              B        |L52.210|
                  |L52.100|
;;;1694           }
;;;1695           l_s8Temp = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000064  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000066  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
000068  4630              MOV      r0,r6
00006a  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
00006e  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0
;;;1696           l_u8NumLen = GetLenOfStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000070  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000072  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
000074  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000076  f7fffffe          BL       GetLenOfStr
00007a  4680              MOV      r8,r0
;;;1697           if(l_s8Temp>0&&l_s8Temp<=Def_outport_num)
00007c  2d00              CMP      r5,#0
00007e  dd0a              BLE      |L52.150|
000080  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
000082  dc08              BGT      |L52.150|
;;;1698           {
;;;1699               l_pCmd = l_pCmd+l_u8NumLen+1;
000084  eb060008          ADD      r0,r6,r8
000088  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
;;;1700               l_s8Output[i] =l_s8Temp-1;
00008a  1e68              SUBS     r0,r5,#1
00008c  a901              ADD      r1,sp,#4
00008e  5508              STRB     r0,[r1,r4]
;;;1701               i++;
000090  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1
000092  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
000094  e019              B        |L52.202|
                  |L52.150|
;;;1702           }
;;;1703           else
;;;1704           {
;;;1705               l_s8Temp = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,')',3);
000096  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000098  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
00009a  4630              MOV      r0,r6
00009c  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
0000a0  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0
;;;1706               l_u8NumLen = GetLenOfStr(l_pCmd,')',3);
0000a2  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
0000a4  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
0000a6  4630              MOV      r0,r6
0000a8  f7fffffe          BL       GetLenOfStr
0000ac  4680              MOV      r8,r0
;;;1707               if(l_s8Temp>0&&l_s8Temp<=Def_outport_num)
0000ae  2d00              CMP      r5,#0
0000b0  dd0a              BLE      |L52.200|
0000b2  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
0000b4  dc08              BGT      |L52.200|
;;;1708               {
;;;1709                   l_pCmd = l_pCmd+l_u8NumLen+1;
0000b6  eb060008          ADD      r0,r6,r8
0000ba  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
;;;1710                   l_s8Output[i] =l_s8Temp-1;
0000bc  1e68              SUBS     r0,r5,#1
0000be  a901              ADD      r1,sp,#4
0000c0  5508              STRB     r0,[r1,r4]
;;;1711                   i++;
0000c2  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1
0000c4  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0
0000c6  e000              B        |L52.202|
                  |L52.200|
;;;1712               }
;;;1713               else
;;;1714                   break;
0000c8  e003              B        |L52.210|
                  |L52.202|
;;;1715           }
;;;1716   
;;;1717           if(i>=Def_outport_num)
0000ca  2c04              CMP      r4,#4
0000cc  db00              BLT      |L52.208|
;;;1718               break;
0000ce  e000              B        |L52.210|
                  |L52.208|
;;;1719       }
;;;1720       while(1);
0000d0  e7bc              B        |L52.76|
                  |L52.210|
0000d2  bf00              NOP                            ;1693
;;;1721   
;;;1722       l_s8Temp = i;
0000d4  4625              MOV      r5,r4
;;;1723       bubble_sort((u8*)l_s8Output,l_s8Temp,0);
0000d6  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
0000d8  4629              MOV      r1,r5
0000da  a801              ADD      r0,sp,#4
0000dc  f7fffffe          BL       bubble_sort
;;;1724   
;;;1725       for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)
0000e0  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
0000e2  e020              B        |L52.294|
                  |L52.228|
;;;1726       {
;;;1727           if(i == l_s8Output[j])
0000e4  a801              ADD      r0,sp,#4
0000e6  f810000a          LDRB     r0,[r0,r10]
0000ea  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
0000ec  d119              BNE      |L52.290|
;;;1728           {
;;;1729               j++;
0000ee  f10a0001          ADD      r0,r10,#1
0000f2  f0000aff          AND      r10,r0,#0xff
;;;1730               pCommVar->SendPrintf("out %d bypass in %d\r\n",i+1,l_s8Input);
0000f6  465a              MOV      r2,r11
0000f8  1c61              ADDS     r1,r4,#1
0000fa  a00e              ADR      r0,|L52.308|
0000fc  68fb              LDR      r3,[r7,#0xc]
0000fe  4798              BLX      r3
;;;1731               l_u8RealPort = cg_u8ChannelTable[l_s8Input-1][1]+1;
000100  f1ab0001          SUB      r0,r11,#1
000104  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1
000108  4910              LDR      r1,|L52.332|
00010a  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1
00010c  7840              LDRB     r0,[r0,#1]
00010e  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
000110  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
000112  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;1732               app_MS1826BypassSwitch(0,l_u8RealPort-1, i);
000114  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
