000118  b2c1              UXTB     r1,r0
00011a  4622              MOV      r2,r4
00011c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00011e  f7fffffe          BL       app_MS1826BypassSwitch
                  |L52.290|
000122  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;1725
000124  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;1725
                  |L52.294|
000126  2c04              CMP      r4,#4                 ;1725
000128  dbdc              BLT      |L52.228|
;;;1733           }
;;;1734       }
;;;1735   
;;;1736       return l_state;
00012a  9802              LDR      r0,[sp,#8]
;;;1737   
;;;1738   }
00012c  e8bd8ffe          POP      {r1-r11,pc}
;;;1739   
                          ENDP

                  mapp_CmdfuncCheckGetTxEdid PROC
;;;1928   //eFunc_CheckGetTxEdid
;;;1929   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncCheckGetTxEdid(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;1930   {
000004  b0c0              SUB      sp,sp,#0x100
000006  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000008  460f              MOV      r7,r1
;;;1931       emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
00000a  f04f0901          MOV      r9,#1
;;;1932       char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);

00001a  69a1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x18]

;;;1933       s8 l_s8Num = 0;
000020  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;1934       u8 l_u8Edid[256];
;;;1935       u8 l_u8RealPort;
;;;1936   
;;;1937       l_s8Num = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,'.',3);

000028  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr

;;;1938   
;;;1939       if(l_s8Num>0)

;;;1940       {
;;;1941           l_s8Num = (l_s8Num-1)%4+1;

000036  eb007191          ADD      r1,r0,r1,LSR #30
00003a  1089              ASRS     r1,r1,#2
00003c  eba00181          SUB      r1,r0,r1,LSL #2
000040  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1

;;;1942           l_u8RealPort = cg_u8ChannelTable[l_s8Num-1][0]+1;

000046  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1

;;;1943           app_ms1826_get_tx_edid_data(0,(l_u8RealPort-1)%4,l_u8Edid);
000054  f1a80601          SUB      r6,r8,#1
000058  17f0              ASRS     r0,r6,#31
00005a  eb067090          ADD      r0,r6,r0,LSR #30
00005e  1080              ASRS     r0,r0,#2
000060  eba60080          SUB      r0,r6,r0,LSL #2
000064  b2c1              UXTB     r1,r0
000066  466a              MOV      r2,sp
000068  2000              MOVS     r0,#0

;;;1944           pCommVar->SendPrintf("OEDID%02d",l_s8Num);

000070  a00a              ADR      r0,|L55.156|
000072  68e2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0xc]

;;;1945           pCommVar->SendBytes(l_u8Edid,256,FALSE);
000076  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000078  f44f7180          MOV      r1,#0x100

                  mapp_CmdfuncCheckOutputCardType PROC
;;;1826   //eFunc_CheckOutputCardType,
;;;1827   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncCheckOutputCardType(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1828   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;1829       emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  2701              MOVS     r7,#1
;;;1830       char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
00000a  490e              LDR      r1,|L56.68|
00000c  eb011105          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #4
000010  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
000012  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
000016  69a1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x18]
000018  eb000801          ADD      r8,r0,r1

00001c  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;1832

000024  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr

000032  a007              ADR      r0,|L56.80|
000034  68e3              LDR      r3,[r4,#0xc]
000036  4798              BLX      r3
;;;1838           l_state = emCmdNone;

00003a  e000              B        |L56.62|
                  |L56.60|
;;;1839       }
;;;1840       else
;;;1841           l_state = emCmdError;
00003c  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
                  |L56.62|
;;;1842   
;;;1843       return l_state;
00003e  4638              MOV      r0,r7
;;;1844   }
000040  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;1845   
                          ENDP

                  mapp_CmdfuncFactoryReset PROC
;;;120    //eFunc_FactoryReset,
;;;121    static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncFactoryReset(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;122    {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;123        mapp_UserData_HdmiSelInit();
000006  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_UserData_HdmiSelInit
;;;124        SetUserData_HdmiSel();
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       SetUserData_HdmiSel
;;;125        delay_ms(100);
00000e  2064              MOVS     r0,#0x64
000010  f7fffffe          BL       delay_ms
;;;126        LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecBasicVarDefault();
000014  f7fffffe          BL       LMX_4OUHS_C_SpecBasicVarDefault
;;;127        SetUserData_SpecBasicVar();
000018  f7fffffe          BL       SetUserData_SpecBasicVar
;;;128        delay_ms(100);
00001c  2064              MOVS     r0,#0x64
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       delay_ms
;;;129    
;;;130        mapp_UserDataEdidIndexInit();
000022  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_UserDataEdidIndexInit
;;;131        SetUserData_EdidIndexSave();
000026  f7fffffe          BL       SetUserData_EdidIndexSave
;;;132        delay_ms(500);
00002a  f44f70fa          MOV      r0,#0x1f4
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       delay_ms
;;;133        #if _ENABLE_SYSTEM_RESET_DELAY_TIME
;;;134        mapp_SetSysResetModeDelayTime(1500);
000032  f24050dc          MOV      r0,#0x5dc
000036  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_SetSysResetModeDelayTime
;;;135        #endif
;;;136    
;;;137        return emCmdSucess;
00003a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;138    }
00003c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;139    
                          ENDP

                  |L59.58|

00004e  dbf4              BLT      |L59.58|
;;;681                }
;;;682            }

                  |L59.82|
;;;683            else
;;;684            {
;;;685                pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d brightness %d\r\n",l_s8Output,pstBasicVar->u8Brightness[l_s8Output-1]);

;;;692    }

;;;748        {
;;;749            if(l_s8Output == 0)
000034  b96d              CBNZ     r5,|L61.82|
;;;750            {
;;;751                u8 i;
;;;752                for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)

000038  e008              B        |L61.76|
                  |L61.58|
;;;753                {
;;;754                    pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d contrast %d\r\n",i+1,pstBasicVar->u8Contrast[i]);

00004e  dbf4              BLT      |L61.58|
;;;755                }
;;;756            }
000050  e00a              B        |L61.104|
                  |L61.82|
;;;757            else
;;;758            {
;;;759                pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d contrast %d\r\n",l_s8Output,pstBasicVar->u8Contrast[l_s8Output-1]);

000054  f1080116          ADD      r1,r8,#0x16

00005c  a006              ADR      r0,|L61.120|

                  |L61.100|
;;;760            }
;;;761        }

                  |L61.104|
;;;764

;;;766    }

;;;767    
                          ENDP

;;;907            {

0000cc  47b0              BLX      r6                    ;366
0000ce  e001              B        |L66.212|
                  |L66.208|
;;;368                                                                          l_stRxTming.u8VClk);
;;;369            }
;;;370        }
;;;371        else
;;;372            l_state = emCmdOutOfRange;
0000d0  f04f0802          MOV      r8,#2
                  |L66.212|
;;;373    
;;;374        return l_state;

;;;375    }
0000d6  b009              ADD      sp,sp,#0x24
0000d8  e8bd83f0          POP      {r4-r9,pc}
;;;376    
                          ENDP

                  mapp_CmdfuncGetSaturation PROC
;;;811    //eFunc_GetSaturation,
;;;812    static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncGetSaturation(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d5ff0          PUSH     {r4-r12,lr}
;;;813    {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460f              MOV      r7,r1
;;;814        emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  f04f0901          MOV      r9,#1
;;;815        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
00000c  f8dfa060          LDR      r10,|L67.112|
;;;816        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000010  46d0              MOV      r8,r10
;;;817        char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000012  4918              LDR      r1,|L67.116|
000014  eb011107          ADD      r1,r1,r7,LSL #4
000018  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
00001e  69a1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x18]
000020  eb000b01          ADD      r11,r0,r1
;;;818        char l_s8Output;
;;;819    
;;;820        l_s8Output = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,')',3);
000024  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000026  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
000028  4658              MOV      r0,r11
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
00002e  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0
;;;821        if(l_s8Output<=Def_outport_num)
000030  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
000032  dc17              BGT      |L67.100|
;;;822        {
;;;823            if(l_s8Output == 0)
000034  b96d              CBNZ     r5,|L67.82|
;;;824            {
;;;825                u8 i;
;;;826                for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)
000036  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
000038  e008              B        |L67.76|
                  |L67.58|
;;;827                {
;;;828                    pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d saturation %d\r\n",i+1,pstBasicVar->u8Saturation[i]);
00003a  f108001a          ADD      r0,r8,#0x1a
00003e  5d82              LDRB     r2,[r0,r6]
000040  1c71              ADDS     r1,r6,#1
000042  a00d              ADR      r0,|L67.120|
000044  68e3              LDR      r3,[r4,#0xc]
000046  4798              BLX      r3
000048  1c70              ADDS     r0,r6,#1              ;826
00004a  b2c6              UXTB     r6,r0                 ;826
                  |L67.76|
00004c  2e04              CMP      r6,#4                 ;826
00004e  dbf4              BLT      |L67.58|
;;;829                }
;;;830            }
000050  e00a              B        |L67.104|
                  |L67.82|
;;;831            else
;;;832            {
;;;833                pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d saturation %d\r\n",l_s8Output,pstBasicVar->u8Saturation[l_s8Output-1]);
000052  1e68              SUBS     r0,r5,#1
000054  f108011a          ADD      r1,r8,#0x1a
000058  5c0a              LDRB     r2,[r1,r0]
00005a  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00005c  a006              ADR      r0,|L67.120|
00005e  68e3              LDR      r3,[r4,#0xc]
000060  4798              BLX      r3
000062  e001              B        |L67.104|
                  |L67.100|
;;;834            }
;;;835        }
;;;836        else
;;;837            l_state = emCmdOutOfRange;
000064  f04f0902          MOV      r9,#2
                  |L67.104|
;;;838    
;;;839        return l_state;
000068  4648              MOV      r0,r9
;;;840    }
00006a  e8bd9ff0          POP      {r4-r12,pc}
;;;841    
                          ENDP

00006e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L67.112|

                  mapp_CmdfuncGetSplicerConfig PROC
;;;1565   //eFunc_GetSplicerConfig,
;;;1566   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncGetSplicerConfig(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d4ffe          PUSH     {r1-r11,lr}
;;;1567   {
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000006  4688              MOV      r8,r1

000008  f8df90c8          LDR      r9,|L68.212|

00000c  464c              MOV      r4,r9
;;;1570       emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
00000e  f04f0a01          MOV      r10,#1
;;;1571       char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000012  4931              LDR      r1,|L68.216|
000014  eb011108          ADD      r1,r1,r8,LSL #4
000018  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
00001e  69b9              LDR      r1,[r7,#0x18]
000020  eb000b01          ADD      r11,r0,r1

;;;1573

000026  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
000028  4658              MOV      r0,r11
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
00002e  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0
;;;1575

000032  d125              BNE      |L68.128|
;;;1577       {
;;;1578           u8 i;
;;;1579           for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)

000036  e020              B        |L68.122|
                  |L68.56|
;;;1580           {
;;;1581               pCommVar->SendPrintf("splicer config: port[%d] en[%d] x[%d] y[%d] w[%d] h[%d]\r\n",i+1,

00003c  eb000046          ADD      r0,r0,r6,LSL #1
000040  8800              LDRH     r0,[r0,#0]
000042  f104014a          ADD      r1,r4,#0x4a
000046  eb010146          ADD      r1,r1,r6,LSL #1
00004a  8809              LDRH     r1,[r1,#0]
00004c  f1040242          ADD      r2,r4,#0x42
000050  eb020246          ADD      r2,r2,r6,LSL #1
000054  8812              LDRH     r2,[r2,#0]
000056  e9cd2100          STRD     r2,r1,[sp,#0]
00005a  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
00005c  f104003a          ADD      r0,r4,#0x3a
000060  eb000046          ADD      r0,r0,r6,LSL #1
000064  8803              LDRH     r3,[r0,#0]
000066  f104005a          ADD      r0,r4,#0x5a
00006a  5d82              LDRB     r2,[r0,r6]
00006c  1c71              ADDS     r1,r6,#1
00006e  a01b              ADR      r0,|L68.220|
000070  f8d7c00c          LDR      r12,[r7,#0xc]
000074  47e0              BLX      r12
000076  1c70              ADDS     r0,r6,#1              ;1579
000078  b2c6              UXTB     r6,r0                 ;1579
                  |L68.122|
00007a  2e04              CMP      r6,#4                 ;1579
00007c  dbdc              BLT      |L68.56|
;;;1582                       pstBasicVar->bSplicerEnable[i],
;;;1583                       pstBasicVar->u16SplicerX[i],
;;;1584                       pstBasicVar->u16SplicerY[i],
;;;1585                       pstBasicVar->u16SplicerWidth[i],
;;;1586                       pstBasicVar->u16SplicerHeight[i]);
;;;1587           }
;;;1588       }
00007e  e026              B        |L68.206|
                  |L68.128|
;;;1589       else if(l_s8Port<=Def_outport_num)
000080  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
000082  dc22              BGT      |L68.202|
;;;1590       {
;;;1591           pCommVar->SendPrintf("splicer config: port[%d] en[%d] x[%d] y[%d] w[%d] h[%d]\r\n",l_s8Port,

000086  f1040152          ADD      r1,r4,#0x52
00008a  eb010040          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #1

00009a  8809              LDRH     r1,[r1,#0]

00009e  f1040342          ADD      r3,r4,#0x42
0000a2  eb030242          ADD      r2,r3,r2,LSL #1
0000a6  8812              LDRH     r2,[r2,#0]
0000a8  e9cd2100          STRD     r2,r1,[sp,#0]
0000ac  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]

0000b4  eb010040          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #1
0000b8  8803              LDRH     r3,[r0,#0]

                  |L68.202|
;;;1592                       pstBasicVar->bSplicerEnable[l_s8Port-1],
;;;1593                       pstBasicVar->u16SplicerX[l_s8Port-1],
;;;1594                       pstBasicVar->u16SplicerY[l_s8Port-1],
;;;1595                       pstBasicVar->u16SplicerWidth[l_s8Port-1],
;;;1596                       pstBasicVar->u16SplicerHeight[l_s8Port-1]);
;;;1597       }
;;;1598       else
;;;1599           l_state = emCmdOutOfRange;
0000ca  f04f0a02          MOV      r10,#2
                  |L68.206|
;;;1600

0000ce  4650              MOV      r0,r10
;;;1602   }
0000d0  e8bd8ffe          POP      {r1-r11,pc}
;;;1603   
                          ENDP

;;;151    //eFunc_GetTestVersion,

000026  8802              LDRH     r2,[r0,#0]  ; g_stTestVersion

00002a  a006              ADR      r0,|L69.68|

00002e  47b0              BLX      r6
;;;157                                            g_stTestVersion.u16Year,
;;;158                                            g_stTestVersion.u8Month,
;;;159                                            g_stTestVersion.u8Date,
;;;160                                            g_stTestVersion.u8Hour,
;;;161                                            g_stTestVersion.u8minute,
;;;162                                            g_stTestVersion.u8Second);
;;;163    
;;;164        return emCmdSucess;

;;;165    }

000034  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;166    
                          ENDP

                  mapp_CmdfuncGetTxEdidData PROC
;;;1065   //eFunc_GetTxEdidData
;;;1066   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncGetTxEdidData(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;1067   {

;;;1074   
;;;1075       memset(l_u8Edid,0,256);
;;;1076   #endif

                  |L70.48|

00003a  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;1083
                  |L70.60|

00003e  dbf7              BLT      |L70.48|

;;;1088               pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d edid:",i+1);
;;;1089               for(j=0;j<256;j++)
;;;1090               {
;;;1091                   if(j%16==0)
;;;1092                   {
;;;1093                       pCommVar->SendPrintf("\r\n");
;;;1094                   }
;;;1095                   pCommVar->SendPrintf("0x%02x,",l_u8Edid[j]);
;;;1096               }
;;;1097               pCommVar->SendPrintf("\r\n");
;;;1098   #endif
;;;1099           }
;;;1100       }
000040  e009              B        |L70.86|
                  |L70.66|
;;;1101       else if(l_s8Output<=_HDMI_INPUT_PORT_USED_NUMBER)

000050  e001              B        |L70.86|
                  |L70.82|
;;;1104   //        app_ms1826_get_tx_edid_data(l_s8Output-1,l_u8Edid);
;;;1105   #if 0
;;;1106           pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d edid:",l_s8Output);
;;;1107           for(j=0;j<256;j++)
;;;1108           {
;;;1109               if(j%16==0)
;;;1110               {
;;;1111                   pCommVar->SendPrintf("\r\n");
;;;1112               }
;;;1113               pCommVar->SendPrintf("0x%02x,",l_u8Edid[j]);

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncGetTxFormat||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncGetTxFormat PROC
;;;500    //eFunc_GetTxFormat,
;;;501    static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncGetTxFormat(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d5ff0          PUSH     {r4-r12,lr}
;;;502    {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460f              MOV      r7,r1
;;;503        emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;

;;;505        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000010  46d0              MOV      r8,r10
;;;506        char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000012  491d              LDR      r1,|L71.136|
000014  eb011107          ADD      r1,r1,r7,LSL #4
000018  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
00001e  69a1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x18]
000020  eb000b01          ADD      r11,r0,r1
;;;507        char l_s8Output;
;;;508    
;;;509        l_s8Output = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,')',3);
000024  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000026  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
000028  4658              MOV      r0,r11
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
00002e  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0

;;;518                }

                  |L71.92|
;;;520            else
;;;521            {

00001c  f7fffffe          BL       strlen

;;;319                for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)

                  |L74.60|

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncModeSwitch||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncModeSwitch PROC
;;;1780   //eFunc_ModeSwitch
;;;1781   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncModeSwitch(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;1782   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;1783       emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  f04f0801          MOV      r8,#1
;;;1784       char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
00000c  4918              LDR      r1,|L76.112|
00000e  eb011105          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #4
000012  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
000014  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
000018  69a1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x18]
00001a  1846              ADDS     r6,r0,r1
;;;1785       char l_s8WorkMode;
;;;1786       char l_s8SubMode;
;;;1787       u8 l_u8NumLen=0;
00001c  f04f0a00          MOV      r10,#0
;;;1788   
;;;1789       l_s8WorkMode = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000020  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000022  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
000024  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000026  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
00002a  b2c7              UXTB     r7,r0
;;;1790       l_u8NumLen = GetLenOfStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
00002c  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00002e  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
000030  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000032  f7fffffe          BL       GetLenOfStr
000036  4682              MOV      r10,r0
;;;1791   
;;;1792       l_pCmd = l_pCmd+l_u8NumLen+1;
000038  eb06000a          ADD      r0,r6,r10
00003c  1c46              ADDS     r6,r0,#1
;;;1793       l_s8SubMode = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,')',3);
00003e  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000040  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
000042  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000044  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
000048  f00009ff          AND      r9,r0,#0xff
;;;1794       if(l_s8WorkMode<=4)
00004c  2f04              CMP      r7,#4
00004e  dc09              BGT      |L76.100|
;;;1795       {
;;;1796           pCommVar->SendPrintf("run mode: %d\r\n",l_s8WorkMode);
000050  4639              MOV      r1,r7
000052  a008              ADR      r0,|L76.116|
000054  68e2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0xc]
000056  4790              BLX      r2
;;;1797           app_MS1826WorkModeSwitch(0,l_s8WorkMode,l_s8SubMode);
000058  464a              MOV      r2,r9
00005a  4639              MOV      r1,r7
00005c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00005e  f7fffffe          BL       app_MS1826WorkModeSwitch
000062  e001              B        |L76.104|
                  |L76.100|
;;;1798       }
;;;1799       else
;;;1800           l_state = emCmdOutOfRange;
000064  f04f0802          MOV      r8,#2
                  |L76.104|
;;;1801   
;;;1802       return l_state;

;;;1803   }
00006a  e8bd87f0          POP      {r4-r10,pc}
;;;1804   
                          ENDP

                  |L76.112|

                  mapp_CmdfuncReboot PROC
;;;140    //eFunc_Reboot,
;;;141    static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncReboot(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;142    {

000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;143        UNUSED(cmdnum);
000006  bf00              NOP      
;;;144        pCommVar->SendPrintf(cmd_list[cmdnum].feedbackstring, TRUE);
000008  4907              LDR      r1,|L77.40|

00000e  68c8              LDR      r0,[r1,#0xc]
000010  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000012  68ea              LDR      r2,[r5,#0xc]
000014  4790              BLX      r2
;;;145        delay_ms(100);
000016  2064              MOVS     r0,#0x64
000018  f7fffffe          BL       delay_ms
;;;146        NVIC_PriorityGroupConfig(0x04);
00001c  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       NVIC_PriorityGroupConfig
;;;147    
;;;148        return emCmdSucess;
000022  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;149    }
000024  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;150    
                          ENDP

000026  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L77.40|

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncSetBrightness||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetBrightness PROC
;;;622    //eFunc_SetBrightness,
;;;623    static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetBrightness(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d5ffc          PUSH     {r2-r12,lr}
;;;624    {
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000006  4688              MOV      r8,r1
;;;625        emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000a  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;626        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
00000c  f8dfb0a4          LDR      r11,|L78.180|
;;;627        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000010  46d9              MOV      r9,r11
;;;628        char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000012  4929              LDR      r1,|L78.184|
000014  eb011108          ADD      r1,r1,r8,LSL #4
000018  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
00001e  69b9              LDR      r1,[r7,#0x18]
000020  eb000a01          ADD      r10,r0,r1
;;;629        u8 l_u8NumLen=0;
000024  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000026  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;630        signed char l_s8Output;
;;;631        signed int  l_s16Brightness;
;;;632        l_s8Output = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000028  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00002a  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
00002c  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
000032  b245              SXTB     r5,r0
;;;633        l_u8NumLen = GetLenOfStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000034  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000036  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
000038  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00003a  f7fffffe          BL       GetLenOfStr
00003e  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;634        l_pCmd = l_pCmd+l_u8NumLen+1;   // skip ','
000040  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
000042  4450              ADD      r0,r0,r10
000044  f1000a01          ADD      r10,r0,#1
;;;635    
;;;636        l_s16Brightness = (signed int)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,')',3);
000048  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00004a  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
00004c  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00004e  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
000052  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;637        if((l_s8Output<=Def_outport_num)&&(l_s16Brightness<=BRIGHTNESS_VALUE_MAX))
000054  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
000056  dc28              BGT      |L78.170|
000058  2c64              CMP      r4,#0x64
00005a  dc26              BGT      |L78.170|
;;;638        {
;;;639            if(l_s8Output == 0)
00005c  b99d              CBNZ     r5,|L78.134|
;;;640            {
;;;641                u8 i;
;;;642                for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)
00005e  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
000060  e00e              B        |L78.128|
                  |L78.98|
;;;643                {
;;;644                    pstBasicVar->u8Brightness[i] = (u8)l_s16Brightness;
000062  f1090012          ADD      r0,r9,#0x12
000066  5584              STRB     r4,[r0,r6]
;;;645                    pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d brightness %d\r\n",i+1,l_s16Brightness);
000068  4622              MOV      r2,r4
00006a  1c71              ADDS     r1,r6,#1
00006c  a013              ADR      r0,|L78.188|
00006e  68fb              LDR      r3,[r7,#0xc]
000070  4798              BLX      r3
;;;646                    app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust(i,(u8)l_s16Brightness,MS1826_ADJUST_BRIGHTNESS);
000072  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000074  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000076  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000078  f7fffffe          BL       app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust
00007c  1c70              ADDS     r0,r6,#1              ;642
00007e  b2c6              UXTB     r6,r0                 ;642
                  |L78.128|
000080  2e04              CMP      r6,#4                 ;642
000082  dbee              BLT      |L78.98|
;;;647                }
;;;648            }
000084  e00e              B        |L78.164|
                  |L78.134|
;;;649            else
;;;650            {
;;;651                pstBasicVar->u8Brightness[l_s8Output-1] = (u8)l_s16Brightness;
000086  1e68              SUBS     r0,r5,#1
000088  f1090112          ADD      r1,r9,#0x12
00008c  540c              STRB     r4,[r1,r0]
;;;652                pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d brightness %d\r\n",l_s8Output,l_s16Brightness);
00008e  4622              MOV      r2,r4
000090  4629              MOV      r1,r5
000092  a00a              ADR      r0,|L78.188|
000094  68fb              LDR      r3,[r7,#0xc]
000096  4798              BLX      r3
;;;653                app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust(l_s8Output-1,(u8)l_s16Brightness,MS1826_ADJUST_BRIGHTNESS);
000098  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4

00009c  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
00009e  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
0000a0  f7fffffe          BL       app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust
                  |L78.164|
;;;654            }
;;;655            SetUserData_SpecBasicVar();
0000a4  f7fffffe          BL       SetUserData_SpecBasicVar
0000a8  e001              B        |L78.174|
                  |L78.170|
;;;656        }
;;;657        else
;;;658            l_state = emCmdOutOfRange;
0000aa  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
0000ac  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
                  |L78.174|
;;;659    
;;;660        return l_state;
0000ae  9801              LDR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;661    }
0000b0  e8bd9ffc          POP      {r2-r12,pc}
;;;662    
                          ENDP

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetCardFunction PROC
;;;2684   //eFunc_SetCardFunction
;;;2685   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetCardFunction(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d4ff8          PUSH     {r3-r11,lr}
;;;2686   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  4688              MOV      r8,r1
;;;2687       emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdNone;
000008  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
00000a  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;2688       char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
00000c  4962              LDR      r1,|L79.408|
00000e  eb011108          ADD      r1,r1,r8,LSL #4
000012  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]

000018  69a1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x18]
00001a  1845              ADDS     r5,r0,r1
;;;2689       u16 l_u16Port = 0;
00001c  bf00              NOP      
;;;2690       u8 l_u8CmdType = 0;
00001e  f04f0900          MOV      r9,#0
;;;2691       u8 l_u8Cmd = 0;
000022  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
;;;2692       l_u16Port = HexAndAsciiChange(*l_pCmd,0)*100+HexAndAsciiChange(*(l_pCmd+1),0)*10+HexAndAsciiChange(*(l_pCmd+2),0);
000024  7828              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0]
000026  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000028  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
00002c  2164              MOVS     r1,#0x64
00002e  fb00fa01          MUL      r10,r0,r1
000032  7868              LDRB     r0,[r5,#1]
000034  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000036  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
00003a  eb000080          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #2
00003e  eb0a0a40          ADD      r10,r10,r0,LSL #1
000042  78a8              LDRB     r0,[r5,#2]
000044  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000046  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
00004a  4450              ADD      r0,r0,r10
00004c  b286              UXTH     r6,r0
;;;2693       l_u16Port = (l_u16Port-1)%4+1;

000050  17c1              ASRS     r1,r0,#31
000052  eb007191          ADD      r1,r0,r1,LSR #30

;;;2695       if(*(l_pCmd+3) == 'P')

000064  d107              BNE      |L79.118|
;;;2696       {
;;;2697           app_SplicerCmdFunction(l_u16Port,l_pCmd+4);

000068  1d29              ADDS     r1,r5,#4
00006a  f7fffffe          BL       app_SplicerCmdFunction
;;;2698           pCommVar->SendPrintf("OKEND");

000070  68e1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0xc]
000072  4788              BLX      r1
000074  e08c              B        |L79.400|
                  |L79.118|
;;;2699       }
;;;2700       else
;;;2701       {
;;;2702           l_u8CmdType = HexAndAsciiChange(*(l_pCmd+3),0)*10+HexAndAsciiChange(*(l_pCmd+4),0);

000078  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00007a  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
00007e  4682              MOV      r10,r0
000080  78e8              LDRB     r0,[r5,#3]
000082  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000084  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange

00008c  eb0a0040          ADD      r0,r10,r0,LSL #1
000090  f00009ff          AND      r9,r0,#0xff
;;;2703           l_u8Cmd = HexAndAsciiChange(*(l_pCmd+5),0)*10+HexAndAsciiChange(*(l_pCmd+6),0);

000096  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000098  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
00009c  4682              MOV      r10,r0
00009e  7968              LDRB     r0,[r5,#5]
0000a0  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
0000a2  f7fffffe          BL       HexAndAsciiChange
0000a6  eb000080          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #2
0000aa  eb0a0040          ADD      r0,r10,r0,LSL #1

;;;2704   
;;;2705           switch(l_u8CmdType)

;;;2739                       }
;;;2740                   }
;;;2741                   break;

;;;2742               case 7:

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncSetColor||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetColor PROC
;;;1295   //eFunc_SetColor,
;;;1296   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetColor(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d4ff3          PUSH     {r0,r1,r4-r11,lr}
;;;1297   {
000004  b087              SUB      sp,sp,#0x1c

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncSetContrast||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetContrast PROC
;;;695    //eFunc_SetContrast,
;;;696    static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetContrast(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d5ffc          PUSH     {r2-r12,lr}
;;;697    {
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000006  4688              MOV      r8,r1
;;;698        emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000a  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;699        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
00000c  f8dfb0a4          LDR      r11,|L81.180|
;;;700        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000010  46d9              MOV      r9,r11
;;;701        char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000012  4929              LDR      r1,|L81.184|
000014  eb011108          ADD      r1,r1,r8,LSL #4
000018  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
00001e  69b9              LDR      r1,[r7,#0x18]
000020  eb000a01          ADD      r10,r0,r1
;;;702        u8 l_u8NumLen=0;
000024  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000026  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;703        signed char l_s8Output;
;;;704        signed int  l_s16Value;
;;;705        l_s8Output = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000028  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00002a  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
00002c  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
000032  b245              SXTB     r5,r0
;;;706        l_u8NumLen = GetLenOfStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000034  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000036  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
000038  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00003a  f7fffffe          BL       GetLenOfStr
00003e  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;707        l_pCmd = l_pCmd+l_u8NumLen+1;   // skip ','
000040  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
000042  4450              ADD      r0,r0,r10
000044  f1000a01          ADD      r10,r0,#1
;;;708    
;;;709        l_s16Value = (signed int)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,')',3);
000048  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00004a  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
00004c  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00004e  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
000052  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;710        if((l_s8Output<=Def_outport_num)&&(l_s16Value<=CONTRAST_VALUE_MAX))
000054  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
000056  dc28              BGT      |L81.170|
000058  2c64              CMP      r4,#0x64
00005a  dc26              BGT      |L81.170|
;;;711        {
;;;712            if(l_s8Output == 0)
00005c  b99d              CBNZ     r5,|L81.134|
;;;713            {
;;;714                u8 i;
;;;715                for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)
00005e  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
000060  e00e              B        |L81.128|
                  |L81.98|
;;;716                {
;;;717                    pstBasicVar->u8Contrast[i] = (u8)l_s16Value;
000062  f1090016          ADD      r0,r9,#0x16
000066  5584              STRB     r4,[r0,r6]
;;;718                    pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d contrast %d\r\n",i+1,l_s16Value);
000068  4622              MOV      r2,r4
00006a  1c71              ADDS     r1,r6,#1
00006c  a013              ADR      r0,|L81.188|
00006e  68fb              LDR      r3,[r7,#0xc]
000070  4798              BLX      r3
;;;719                    app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust(i,(u8)l_s16Value,MS1826_ADJUST_CONTRAST);
000072  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000074  2202              MOVS     r2,#2
000076  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000078  f7fffffe          BL       app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust
00007c  1c70              ADDS     r0,r6,#1              ;715
00007e  b2c6              UXTB     r6,r0                 ;715
                  |L81.128|
000080  2e04              CMP      r6,#4                 ;715
000082  dbee              BLT      |L81.98|
;;;720                }
;;;721            }
000084  e00e              B        |L81.164|
                  |L81.134|
;;;722            else
;;;723            {
;;;724                pstBasicVar->u8Contrast[l_s8Output-1] = (u8)l_s16Value;
000086  1e68              SUBS     r0,r5,#1
000088  f1090116          ADD      r1,r9,#0x16
00008c  540c              STRB     r4,[r1,r0]
;;;725                pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d contrast %d\r\n",l_s8Output,l_s16Value);
00008e  4622              MOV      r2,r4
000090  4629              MOV      r1,r5
000092  a00a              ADR      r0,|L81.188|
000094  68fb              LDR      r3,[r7,#0xc]
000096  4798              BLX      r3
;;;726                app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust(l_s8Output-1,(u8)l_s16Value,MS1826_ADJUST_CONTRAST);
000098  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
00009a  1e6a              SUBS     r2,r5,#1
00009c  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
00009e  2202              MOVS     r2,#2
0000a0  f7fffffe          BL       app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust
                  |L81.164|
;;;727            }
;;;728            SetUserData_SpecBasicVar();
0000a4  f7fffffe          BL       SetUserData_SpecBasicVar
0000a8  e001              B        |L81.174|
                  |L81.170|
;;;729        }
;;;730        else
;;;731            l_state = emCmdOutOfRange;
0000aa  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
0000ac  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
                  |L81.174|
;;;732    
;;;733        return l_state;
0000ae  9801              LDR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;734    }
0000b0  e8bd9ffc          POP      {r2-r12,pc}
;;;735    
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncSetDebugEn||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetDebugEn PROC
;;;1414   //eFunc_SetDebugEn
;;;1415   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetDebugEn(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;1416   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;1417       emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  f04f0801          MOV      r8,#1
;;;1418       pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
00000c  f8df9054          LDR      r9,|L82.100|
;;;1419       pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000010  464f              MOV      r7,r9
;;;1420       char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000012  4915              LDR      r1,|L82.104|
000014  eb011106          ADD      r1,r1,r6,LSL #4
000018  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
00001e  69a1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x18]
000020  eb000a01          ADD      r10,r0,r1
;;;1421       char l_s8DebugEn;
;;;1422   
;;;1423       l_s8DebugEn = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,')',3);
000024  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000026  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
000028  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
00002e  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0
;;;1424       if(l_s8DebugEn<=1)
000030  2d01              CMP      r5,#1
000032  dc12              BGT      |L82.90|
;;;1425       {
;;;1426           pCommVar->SendPrintf("debug: %s\r\n",l_s8DebugEn?"en":"dis");
000034  b10d              CBZ      r5,|L82.58|
000036  a00d              ADR      r0,|L82.108|
000038  e000              B        |L82.60|
                  |L82.58|

                  |L82.60|

000046  2001              MOVS     r0,#1

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncSetFrameLock||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetFrameLock PROC
;;;1604   //eFunc_SetFrameLock
;;;1605   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetFrameLock(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d4ff8          PUSH     {r3-r11,lr}
;;;1606   {
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  4689              MOV      r9,r1
;;;1607       emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000a  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;1608   //    pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
;;;1609   //    pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
;;;1610       u8 l_u8NumLen=0;
00000c  f04f0b00          MOV      r11,#0
;;;1611       char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000010  4928              LDR      r1,|L83.180|
000012  eb011109          ADD      r1,r1,r9,LSL #4
000016  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
000018  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
00001c  69a9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x18]
00001e  eb000a01          ADD      r10,r0,r1
;;;1612       signed char l_s8Output,l_s8Input;
;;;1613       u8 l_u8RealPort;
;;;1614   
;;;1615       l_s8Output = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000022  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000024  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
000026  4650              MOV      r0,r10
000028  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
00002c  b246              SXTB     r6,r0
;;;1616       l_u8NumLen = GetLenOfStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
00002e  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000030  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
000032  4650              MOV      r0,r10
000034  f7fffffe          BL       GetLenOfStr
000038  4683              MOV      r11,r0
;;;1617       l_pCmd = l_pCmd+l_u8NumLen+1;   // skip ','
00003a  eb0a000b          ADD      r0,r10,r11
00003e  f1000a01          ADD      r10,r0,#1
;;;1618   
;;;1619       l_s8Input = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,')',3);
000042  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000044  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
000046  4650              MOV      r0,r10
000048  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
00004c  b244              SXTB     r4,r0
;;;1620       if((l_s8Output<=Def_outport_num)&&((l_s8Input>0)&&(l_s8Input<=_HDMI_INPUT_PORT_USED_NUMBER)))
00004e  2e04              CMP      r6,#4
000050  dc29              BGT      |L83.166|
000052  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
000054  dd27              BLE      |L83.166|
000056  2c04              CMP      r4,#4
000058  dc25              BGT      |L83.166|
;;;1621       {
;;;1622           if(l_s8Output == 0)
00005a  b9b6              CBNZ     r6,|L83.138|
;;;1623           {
;;;1624               u8 i;
;;;1625               for(i=0;i<_HDMI_INPUT_PORT_USED_NUMBER;i++)
00005c  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0
000060  e00f              B        |L83.130|
                  |L83.98|
;;;1626               {
;;;1627                   l_u8RealPort = cg_u8ChannelTable[l_s8Input-1][1];
000062  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
000064  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1
000068  4913              LDR      r1,|L83.184|
00006a  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1
00006c  7847              LDRB     r7,[r0,#1]
;;;1628                   pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d frame lock %d\r\n",i+1,l_s8Output);
00006e  4632              MOV      r2,r6
000070  f1080101          ADD      r1,r8,#1
000074  a011              ADR      r0,|L83.188|
000076  68eb              LDR      r3,[r5,#0xc]
000078  4798              BLX      r3
00007a  f1080001          ADD      r0,r8,#1              ;1625
00007e  f00008ff          AND      r8,r0,#0xff           ;1625
                  |L83.130|
000082  f1b80f04          CMP      r8,#4                 ;1625
000086  dbec              BLT      |L83.98|
;;;1629                   #if ENABLE_MS1826_FRAME_LOCK
;;;1630                   app_MS1826FrameLockSelect(0,l_u8RealPort,i);
;;;1631                   #endif
;;;1632               }
;;;1633           }
000088  e00a              B        |L83.160|
                  |L83.138|
;;;1634           else
;;;1635           {
;;;1636               l_u8RealPort = cg_u8ChannelTable[l_s8Input-1][1];
00008a  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
00008c  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1
000090  4909              LDR      r1,|L83.184|
000092  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1
000094  7847              LDRB     r7,[r0,#1]
;;;1637               pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d frame lock %d\r\n",l_s8Output,l_s8Input);
000096  4622              MOV      r2,r4
000098  4631              MOV      r1,r6
00009a  a008              ADR      r0,|L83.188|
00009c  68eb              LDR      r3,[r5,#0xc]
00009e  4798              BLX      r3
                  |L83.160|
;;;1638               #if ENABLE_MS1826_FRAME_LOCK
;;;1639               app_MS1826FrameLockSelect(0,l_u8RealPort,l_s8Output);
;;;1640               #endif
;;;1641           }
;;;1642           SetUserData_SpecBasicVar();
0000a0  f7fffffe          BL       SetUserData_SpecBasicVar
0000a4  e001              B        |L83.170|
                  |L83.166|
;;;1643       }
;;;1644       else
;;;1645           l_state = emCmdOutOfRange;
0000a6  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
0000a8  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
                  |L83.170|
;;;1646   
;;;1647       UNUSED(l_u8RealPort);
0000aa  bf00              NOP      
;;;1648       return l_state;
0000ac  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;1649   }
0000ae  e8bd8ff8          POP      {r3-r11,pc}
;;;1650   
                          ENDP

0000b2  0000              DCW      0x0000

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncSetHue||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetHue PROC
;;;843    //eFunc_SetHue,
;;;844    static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetHue(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d5ffc          PUSH     {r2-r12,lr}
;;;845    {
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000006  4688              MOV      r8,r1
;;;846        emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000a  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;847        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
00000c  f8dfb0a4          LDR      r11,|L85.180|
;;;848        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000010  46d9              MOV      r9,r11
;;;849        char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000012  4929              LDR      r1,|L85.184|
000014  eb011108          ADD      r1,r1,r8,LSL #4
000018  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
00001e  69b9              LDR      r1,[r7,#0x18]
000020  eb000a01          ADD      r10,r0,r1
;;;850        u8 l_u8NumLen=0;
000024  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000026  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;851        signed char l_s8Output;
;;;852        signed int  l_s16Value;
;;;853    
;;;854        l_s8Output = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000028  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00002a  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
00002c  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
000032  b245              SXTB     r5,r0
;;;855        l_u8NumLen = GetLenOfStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000034  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000036  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
000038  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00003a  f7fffffe          BL       GetLenOfStr
00003e  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;856        l_pCmd = l_pCmd+l_u8NumLen+1;   // skip ','
000040  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
000042  4450              ADD      r0,r0,r10
000044  f1000a01          ADD      r10,r0,#1
;;;857    
;;;858        l_s16Value = (signed int)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,')',3);
000048  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00004a  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
00004c  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00004e  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
000052  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;859        if((l_s8Output<=Def_outport_num)&&(l_s16Value<=HUE_VALUE_MAX))

000056  dc28              BGT      |L85.170|
000058  2c64              CMP      r4,#0x64
00005a  dc26              BGT      |L85.170|
;;;860        {
;;;861            if(l_s8Output == 0)
00005c  b99d              CBNZ     r5,|L85.134|
;;;862            {
;;;863                u8 i;
;;;864                for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)
00005e  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
000060  e00e              B        |L85.128|
                  |L85.98|
;;;865                {
;;;866                    pstBasicVar->u8Hue[i] = (u8)l_s16Value;

;;;867                    pCommVar->SendPrintf("output %d hue %d\r\n",i+1,l_s16Value);
000068  4622              MOV      r2,r4
00006a  1c71              ADDS     r1,r6,#1
00006c  a013              ADR      r0,|L85.188|
00006e  68fb              LDR      r3,[r7,#0xc]
000070  4798              BLX      r3
;;;868                    app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust(i,(u8)l_s16Value,MS1826_ADJUST_HUE);
000072  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000074  2208              MOVS     r2,#8
000076  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000078  f7fffffe          BL       app_LMX_4OUHS_CPictureAdjust
00007c  1c70              ADDS     r0,r6,#1              ;864

;;;869                }
;;;870            }
000084  e00e              B        |L85.164|
                  |L85.134|
;;;871            else
;;;872            {
;;;873                pstBasicVar->u8Hue[l_s8Output-1] = (u8)l_s16Value;

000088  f109011e          ADD      r1,r9,#0x1e
00008c  540c              STRB     r4,[r1,r0]

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetMs1826Hold PROC
;;;1651   //eFunc_SetMs1826Hold
;;;1652   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetMs1826Hold(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1653   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;1654       emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;

;;;1655       char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
00000a  4912              LDR      r1,|L86.84|
00000c  eb011106          ADD      r1,r1,r6,LSL #4
000010  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
000012  f7fffffe          BL       strlen

000018  eb000801          ADD      r8,r0,r1

000022  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr

00002a  dc0f              BGT      |L86.76|
;;;1660       {
;;;1661           pCommVar->SendPrintf("ms1826 hold: %s\r\n",l_s8TempVal?"en":"dis");

000030  e000              B        |L86.52|
                  |L86.50|

                  |L86.52|

                  |L86.66|

                  |L86.68|

                  |L86.76|

;;;1665       else
;;;1666           l_state = emCmdOutOfRange;

                  |L86.78|

;;;1669   }

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncSetSaturation||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetSaturation PROC
;;;769    //eFunc_SetSaturation,
;;;770    static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetSaturation(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d5ffc          PUSH     {r2-r12,lr}
;;;771    {
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000006  4688              MOV      r8,r1
;;;772        emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000a  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;773        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
00000c  f8dfb0a4          LDR      r11,|L88.180|
;;;774        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000010  46d9              MOV      r9,r11
;;;775        char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000012  4929              LDR      r1,|L88.184|
000014  eb011108          ADD      r1,r1,r8,LSL #4
000018  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
00001e  69b9              LDR      r1,[r7,#0x18]
000020  eb000a01          ADD      r10,r0,r1
;;;776        u8 l_u8NumLen=0;
000024  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000026  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;777        signed char l_s8Output;
;;;778        signed int  l_s16Value;
;;;779        l_s8Output = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000028  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00002a  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
00002c  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
000032  b245              SXTB     r5,r0
;;;780        l_u8NumLen = GetLenOfStr(l_pCmd,',',3);

000040  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
000042  4450              ADD      r0,r0,r10
000044  f1000a01          ADD      r10,r0,#1

00004e  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr

000056  dc28              BGT      |L88.170|

00005a  dc26              BGT      |L88.170|

;;;803        }
;;;804        else

;;;808    }

;;;809

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncSetSplitConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetSplitConfig PROC
;;;1437   //eFunc_SetSplitConfig
;;;1438   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetSplitConfig(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d4ff3          PUSH     {r0,r1,r4-r11,lr}
;;;1439   {
000004  b087              SUB      sp,sp,#0x1c
000006  4606              MOV      r6,r0

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetTxFormat PROC
;;;455    //eFunc_SetTxFormat,
;;;456    static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetTxFormat(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d4ffe          PUSH     {r1-r11,lr}
;;;457    {
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000006  468a              MOV      r10,r1
;;;458        emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;

;;;460        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;

;;;461        u8 l_u8NumLen=0;
000014  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000016  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;462        char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000018  4939              LDR      r1,|L91.256|
00001a  eb01110a          ADD      r1,r1,r10,LSL #4
00001e  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
000020  f7fffffe          BL       strlen

000026  eb000b01          ADD      r11,r0,r1

;;;464        u8 l_u8RealPort;
;;;465    
;;;466        l_s8Output = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,',',3);

00002c  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
00002e  4658              MOV      r0,r11
000030  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
000034  b244              SXTB     r4,r0
;;;467        l_u8NumLen = GetLenOfStr(l_pCmd,',',3);

000038  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c

00003c  f7fffffe          BL       GetLenOfStr

;;;468        l_pCmd = l_pCmd+l_u8NumLen+1;   // skip ','

000060  dc46              BGT      |L91.240|
;;;472        {
;;;473            if(l_s8Output == 0)

000064  d122              BNE      |L91.172|
;;;474            {
;;;475                u8 i;
;;;476                for(i=0;i<Def_outport_num;i++)

                  |L91.132|

0000c6  a010              ADR      r0,|L91.264|
0000c8  e000              B        |L91.204|
                  |L91.202|
0000ca  a011              ADR      r0,|L91.272|
                  |L91.204|

0000ce  4621              MOV      r1,r4
0000d0  a010              ADR      r0,|L91.276|

;;;493        else

;;;497    }

;;;498

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncSetTxHdcpMode||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetTxHdcpMode PROC
;;;377    //eFunc_SetTxHdcpMode,
;;;378    static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetTxHdcpMode(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d4ffe          PUSH     {r1-r11,lr}
;;;379    {
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000006  468a              MOV      r10,r1
;;;380        emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000a  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
;;;381        pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
00000c  483a              LDR      r0,|L92.248|
00000e  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;382        pstBasicSpecVar_t           pstBasicVar = &pstSpecVar->stBasSpecVar;
000010  f8dd8004          LDR      r8,[sp,#4]
;;;383        u8 l_u8NumLen=0;
000014  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000016  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;384        char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000018  4938              LDR      r1,|L92.252|
00001a  eb01110a          ADD      r1,r1,r10,LSL #4
00001e  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
000020  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
000024  69b9              LDR      r1,[r7,#0x18]
000026  eb000b01          ADD      r11,r0,r1
;;;385        signed char l_s8Output,l_s8HdcpMode;
;;;386        u8 l_u8RealPort;
;;;387    
;;;388        l_s8Output = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
00002a  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00002c  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
00002e  4658              MOV      r0,r11
000030  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr

;;;290            {

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncSetVideoMute||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncSetVideoMute PROC
;;;1740   //eFunc_SetVideoMute
;;;1741   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSetVideoMute(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d4ff8          PUSH     {r3-r11,lr}
;;;1742   {
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  4689              MOV      r9,r1
;;;1743       emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000a  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;1744       u8 l_u8NumLen=0;
00000c  f04f0b00          MOV      r11,#0
;;;1745       char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
000010  4936              LDR      r1,|L96.236|
000012  eb011109          ADD      r1,r1,r9,LSL #4
000016  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
000018  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
00001c  69a9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x18]
00001e  eb000a01          ADD      r10,r0,r1
;;;1746       signed char l_s8Input,l_s8MuteSta;
;;;1747       u8 l_u8RealPort;
;;;1748   
;;;1749       l_s8Input = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
000022  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000024  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
000026  4650              MOV      r0,r10
000028  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
00002c  b246              SXTB     r6,r0
;;;1750       l_u8NumLen = GetLenOfStr(l_pCmd,',',3);
00002e  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
000030  212c              MOVS     r1,#0x2c
000032  4650              MOV      r0,r10
000034  f7fffffe          BL       GetLenOfStr
000038  4683              MOV      r11,r0

                  mapp_CmdfuncSwitchFreeze PROC
;;;588    //eFunc_SwitchFreeze,
;;;589    static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncSwitchFreeze(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;590    {
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;591        emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;

;;;592        char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);

;;;594        l_u8FreeSta = *l_pCmd;

;;;595    
;;;596        if(*(l_pCmd+1)=='.')

000024  d130              BNE      |L97.136|
;;;597        {
;;;598            if(l_u8FreeSta>0)

000028  dd30              BLE      |L97.140|
;;;599            {
;;;600                if(l_u8FreeSta&0x01)

000046  22c8              MOVS     r2,#0xc8
000048  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       app_MS1826SwitchFreeze
                  |L97.78|

000052  b128              CBZ      r0,|L97.96|

000054  4810              LDR      r0,|L97.152|

000058  22c8              MOVS     r2,#0xc8
00005a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00005c  f7fffffe          BL       app_MS1826SwitchFreeze
                  |L97.96|

                  |L97.114|

;;;225            if(i == l_s8Output[j])

                          AREA ||i.mapp_CmdfuncUpdateUserEdid||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_CmdfuncUpdateUserEdid PROC
;;;1042   //eFunc_UpdateUserEdid,
;;;1043   static emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CmdfuncUpdateUserEdid(pstUartCom_t pCommVar,u8 cmdnum)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1044   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;1045       emCmdFuncStaType l_state = emCmdSucess;
000008  2701              MOVS     r7,#1
;;;1046       char *l_pCmd= pCommVar->pRecBuffer+strlen(cmd_list[cmdnum].ucmd);
00000a  4913              LDR      r1,|L99.88|
00000c  eb011106          ADD      r1,r1,r6,LSL #4
000010  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
000012  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
000016  69a1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x18]
000018  eb000801          ADD      r8,r0,r1
;;;1047       char l_s8UserEDID;
;;;1048   
;;;1049       l_s8UserEDID = (char)GetNumofStr(l_pCmd,')',3);
00001c  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00001e  2129              MOVS     r1,#0x29
000020  4640              MOV      r0,r8
000022  f7fffffe          BL       GetNumofStr
000026  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0
;;;1050       if(l_s8UserEDID>0&&l_s8UserEDID<=4)
000028  2d00              CMP      r5,#0
00002a  dd10              BLE      |L99.78|
00002c  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
00002e  dc0e              BGT      |L99.78|
;;;1051       {
;;;1052           pCommVar->SendPrintf("please send edid file in 15s\r\n");
000030  a00a              ADR      r0,|L99.92|
000032  68e1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0xc]
000034  4788              BLX      r1
;;;1053           PlatformTimerSet(etUserEdidReceiveTime,15000);
000036  f6432198          MOV      r1,#0x3a98
00003a  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       PlatformTimerSet
;;;1054           #if _ENABLE_USER_EDID_LEARNING_FUNCTION
;;;1055           StartEdidCostumFlag = TRUE;
000040  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000042  490e              LDR      r1,|L99.124|
000044  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;1056           g_u8UserEDIDIndex = l_s8UserEDID-1;
000046  1e68              SUBS     r0,r5,#1
000048  490d              LDR      r1,|L99.128|
00004a  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
00004c  e000              B        |L99.80|
                  |L99.78|
;;;1057           #endif
;;;1058       }
;;;1059       else
;;;1060           l_state = emCmdOutOfRange;
00004e  2702              MOVS     r7,#2
                  |L99.80|
;;;1061   
;;;1062       return l_state;
000050  4638              MOV      r0,r7
;;;1063   }
000052  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;1064   
                          ENDP

000056  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L99.88|
                          DCD      cmd_list
                  |L99.92|
00005c  706c6561          DCB      "please send edid file in 15s\r\n",0
000060  73652073
000064  656e6420
000068  65646964
00006c  2066696c
000070  6520696e
000074  20313573
000078  0d0a00  
00007b  00                DCB      0
                  |L99.124|
                          DCD      StartEdidCostumFlag
                  |L99.128|
                          DCD      g_u8UserEDIDIndex

                  mapp_CmdlenIsOK PROC
;;;3074   
;;;3075   bool mapp_CmdlenIsOK(u8 index, pstUartCom_t pCommVar)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;3076   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;3077       //RS232_printf("cmdlen:%d\r\n",pCommVar->u16RecCnt);
;;;3078       if(cmd_list[index].flag&Flag_UserValueLength)
000006  4820              LDR      r0,|L100.136|
000008  eb001004          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #4
00000c  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]
00000e  f0000008          AND      r0,r0,#8
000012  b310              CBZ      r0,|L100.90|
;;;3079       {
;;;3080           if((pCommVar->u16RecCnt<=(strlen(cmd_list[index].ucmd)+cmd_list[index].valuelen+cmd_list[index].cmdoffset))
000014  491c              LDR      r1,|L100.136|
000016  eb011104          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #4
00001a  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
000020  4919              LDR      r1,|L100.136|
000022  eb011104          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #4
000026  7a49              LDRB     r1,[r1,#9]
000028  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1
00002a  4917              LDR      r1,|L100.136|
00002c  eb011104          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #4
000030  7a89              LDRB     r1,[r1,#0xa]
000032  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1
000034  8ae9              LDRH     r1,[r5,#0x16]
000036  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000038  d324              BCC      |L100.132|
;;;3081               &&(pCommVar->u16RecCnt>=(strlen(cmd_list[index].ucmd)+cmd_list[index].cmdoffset)))
00003a  4913              LDR      r1,|L100.136|
00003c  eb011104          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #4
000040  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]
000042  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
000046  4910              LDR      r1,|L100.136|
000048  eb011104          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #4
00004c  7a89              LDRB     r1,[r1,#0xa]
00004e  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1
000050  8ae9              LDRH     r1,[r5,#0x16]
000052  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000054  d816              BHI      |L100.132|
;;;3082               return TRUE;
000056  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L100.88|
;;;3083       }
;;;3084       else
;;;3085       {
;;;3086           if(pCommVar->u16RecCnt==(strlen(cmd_list[index].ucmd)+cmd_list[index].valuelen+cmd_list[index].cmdoffset))
;;;3087               return TRUE;
;;;3088       }
;;;3089       return FALSE;
;;;3090   }
000058  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L100.90|
00005a  490b              LDR      r1,|L100.136|
00005c  eb011104          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #4       ;3086
000060  6848              LDR      r0,[r1,#4]            ;3086
000062  f7fffffe          BL       strlen
000066  4908              LDR      r1,|L100.136|
000068  eb011104          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #4       ;3086
00006c  7a49              LDRB     r1,[r1,#9]            ;3086
00006e  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1              ;3086
000070  4905              LDR      r1,|L100.136|
000072  eb011104          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #4       ;3086
000076  7a89              LDRB     r1,[r1,#0xa]          ;3086
000078  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1              ;3086
00007a  8ae9              LDRH     r1,[r5,#0x16]         ;3086
00007c  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;3086
00007e  d101              BNE      |L100.132|
000080  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;3087
000082  e7e9              B        |L100.88|
                  |L100.132|
000084  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;3089
000086  e7e7              B        |L100.88|
;;;3091   
                          ENDP

                  mapp_CommandFunctionProcess PROC
;;;2799   //***********************************************************
;;;2800   emCmdFuncStaType mapp_CommandFunctionProcess(u8 cmdnum,u8 flag,pstUartCom_t pCommVar)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;2801   {

000006  460d              MOV      r5,r1

;;;2802       emCmdFuncStaType l_bStatus=emCmdError;

;;;2805       //UNUSED(cmdnum);
;;;2806       switch( mapp_GetCommandFunctionID())

000014  d270              BCS      |L101.248|
000016  e8dff000          TBB      [pc,r0]
00001a  f21b              DCB      0xf2,0x1b
00001c  21273339          DCB      0x21,0x27,0x33,0x39
000020  6f6f6f6f          DCB      0x6f,0x6f,0x6f,0x6f
000024  2d3f454b          DCB      0x2d,0x3f,0x45,0x4b
000028  51575d63          DCB      0x51,0x57,0x5d,0x63
00002c  6970767c          DCB      0x69,0x70,0x76,0x7c

                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.mapp_GetCommandFunctionID||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_GetCommandFunctionID PROC
;;;2787   
;;;2788   eCmdFun_t  mapp_GetCommandFunctionID(void)
000000  4801              LDR      r0,|L102.8|
;;;2789   {
;;;2790       return cmdfunctionID;
000002  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; cmdfunctionID
;;;2791   }
000004  4770              BX       lr
;;;2792   
                          ENDP

000006  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L102.8|
                          DCD      cmdfunctionID

                          AREA ||i.mapp_GetKeyFunctionNum||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_GetKeyFunctionNum PROC

;;;278    u8 mapp_GetKeyFunctionNum(void)
