;;;282    
                          ENDP

000006  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L103.8|
                          DCD      sg_u8KeyFunctionName

                          AREA ||i.mapp_GetSysResetMode||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_GetSysResetMode PROC
;;;451    
;;;452    bool mapp_GetSysResetMode(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;453    {
;;;454        if(g_bSysResetFlag)
000002  4805              LDR      r0,|L104.24|
000004  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; g_bSysResetFlag
000006  b128              CBZ      r0,|L104.20|
;;;455        {
;;;456            if(PlatformTimerExpired(etSysResetTimer))
000008  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       PlatformTimerExpired
00000e  b108              CBZ      r0,|L104.20|
;;;457            {
;;;458                return TRUE;
000010  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L104.18|
;;;459            }
;;;460        }
;;;461        return FALSE;
;;;462    }
000012  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L104.20|
000014  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;461
000016  e7fc              B        |L104.18|
;;;463    #endif
                          ENDP

                  |L104.24|
                          DCD      g_bSysResetFlag

                          AREA ||i.mapp_KeyFunctionProcess||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  mapp_KeyFunctionProcess PROC
;;;282    
;;;283    void mapp_KeyFunctionProcess(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;284    {
;;;285        mapp_NewKeyScan();
000002  f7fffffe          BL       mapp_NewKeyScan
;;;286        LMX_4OUHS_C_FuncWork_LoopRunning();
000006  f7fffffe          BL       LMX_4OUHS_C_FuncWork_LoopRunning
;;;287    }
00000a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;288    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.mapp_KeyValueScan||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_KeyValueScan PROC
;;;48     
;;;49     void mapp_KeyValueScan(u32 *tKeyPadVaule)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;50     {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;51         static emKeyFunction tKeyvFunction=emKeyFunc_None;
;;;52         static bool ComboKeyFlag = FALSE;
;;;53         static emKeyFunction KeyValue = emKeyFunc_None;
;;;54         static emKeyFunction RealKeyValue = emKeyFunc_None;
;;;55         static u8 PreKeyScanTypeValue=0xFF;
;;;56         static u8 PreKeyScanTypeValue2=0xFF;
;;;57         u8 i = 0;
000004  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;58     
;;;59         for(i=1;i<(sizeof(stKeyScanGroup)/sizeof(stKeyScanGroup[0]));i++)
000006  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
000008  e177              B        |L106.762|
                  |L106.10|
;;;60         {
;;;61             if(stKeyScanGroup[i].m_Flag==KeyFlag_NoUse)
00000a  ebc400c4          RSB      r0,r4,r4,LSL #3
00000e  49d1              LDR      r1,|L106.852|
000010  eb010080          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #2
000014  7e40              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x19]
000016  b900              CBNZ     r0,|L106.26|
;;;62             {
;;;63                 continue;
000018  e16d              B        |L106.758|
                  |L106.26|
;;;64             }
;;;65             else
;;;66             #if 1
;;;67             if(stKeyScanGroup[i].m_Flag&KeyFlag_DIPSwitcher)
00001a  ebc400c4          RSB      r0,r4,r4,LSL #3
00001e  49cd              LDR      r1,|L106.852|
000020  eb010080          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #2
000024  7e40              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x19]
000026  f0000002          AND      r0,r0,#2
00002a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00002c  d07e              BEQ      |L106.300|
;;;68             {
;;;69                 if(tKeyPadVaule[stKeyScanGroup[i].m_KSTypeGroup] == stKeyScanGroup[i].m_KSTypeValue)
00002e  ebc400c4          RSB      r0,r4,r4,LSL #3
000032  f8110020          LDRB     r0,[r1,r0,LSL #2]
000036  f8550020          LDR      r0,[r5,r0,LSL #2]
00003a  ebc401c4          RSB      r1,r4,r4,LSL #3
00003e  4ac5              LDR      r2,|L106.852|
000040  eb020181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #2
000044  6849              LDR      r1,[r1,#4]
000046  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000048  d171              BNE      |L106.302|
;;;70                 {
;;;71                     if((tKeyPadVaule[stKeyScanGroup[i].m_KSTypeGroup] != PreKeyScanTypeValue)
00004a  ebc400c4          RSB      r0,r4,r4,LSL #3
00004e  4611              MOV      r1,r2
000050  f8110020          LDRB     r0,[r1,r0,LSL #2]
000054  f8550020          LDR      r0,[r5,r0,LSL #2]
000058  49bf              LDR      r1,|L106.856|
00005a  7809              LDRB     r1,[r1,#0]  ; PreKeyScanTypeValue
00005c  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00005e  d105              BNE      |L106.108|
;;;72                         ||PreKeyScanTypeValue2!=PreKeyScanTypeValue)
000060  48be              LDR      r0,|L106.860|
000062  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; PreKeyScanTypeValue2
000064  49bc              LDR      r1,|L106.856|
000066  7809              LDRB     r1,[r1,#0]  ; PreKeyScanTypeValue
000068  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00006a  d060              BEQ      |L106.302|
                  |L106.108|
;;;73                     {
;;;74                         //PreKeyScanTypeValue = tKeyPadVaule[stKeyScanGroup[i].m_KSTypeGroup];
;;;75                         //RS232_printf("PreKeyScanTypeValue[%d]=%d\n",i,PreKeyScanTypeValue);
;;;76     
;;;77                         if(PreKeyScanTypeValue2 == PreKeyScanTypeValue) // modify by wf8421 20181210
00006c  48bb              LDR      r0,|L106.860|
00006e  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; PreKeyScanTypeValue2
000070  49b9              LDR      r1,|L106.856|
000072  7809              LDRB     r1,[r1,#0]  ; PreKeyScanTypeValue
000074  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000076  d108              BNE      |L106.138|
;;;78                             PreKeyScanTypeValue2 = tKeyPadVaule[stKeyScanGroup[i].m_KSTypeGroup];
000078  ebc400c4          RSB      r0,r4,r4,LSL #3
00007c  49b5              LDR      r1,|L106.852|
00007e  f8110020          LDRB     r0,[r1,r0,LSL #2]
000082  f8150020          LDRB     r0,[r5,r0,LSL #2]
000086  49b5              LDR      r1,|L106.860|
000088  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
                  |L106.138|
;;;79                         if(tKeyvFunction == stKeyScanGroup[i].m_KSTypeKeyNomalType
00008a  ebc400c4          RSB      r0,r4,r4,LSL #3
00008e  49b1              LDR      r1,|L106.852|
000090  eb010080          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #2
000094  7a00              LDRB     r0,[r0,#8]
000096  49b2              LDR      r1,|L106.864|
000098  7809              LDRB     r1,[r1,#0]  ; tKeyvFunction
00009a  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00009c  d014              BEQ      |L106.200|
;;;80                             ||tKeyvFunction == emKeyFunc_repeat
00009e  48b0              LDR      r0,|L106.864|
0000a0  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; tKeyvFunction
0000a2  2807              CMP      r0,#7
0000a4  d010              BEQ      |L106.200|
;;;81                             ||((stKeyScanGroup[i].m_KSTypeMultiFuncEnable==TRUE)&&(tKeyvFunction == stKeyScanGroup[i].m_KSTypeKeyMultiFuncType))
0000a6  ebc400c4          RSB      r0,r4,r4,LSL #3
0000aa  49aa              LDR      r1,|L106.852|
0000ac  eb010080          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #2
0000b0  7c40              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x11]
0000b2  2801              CMP      r0,#1
0000b4  d156              BNE      |L106.356|
0000b6  ebc400c4          RSB      r0,r4,r4,LSL #3
0000ba  eb010080          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #2
0000be  7e00              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x18]
0000c0  49a7              LDR      r1,|L106.864|
0000c2  7809              LDRB     r1,[r1,#0]  ; tKeyvFunction
0000c4  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0000c6  d14d              BNE      |L106.356|
                  |L106.200|
;;;82                             )
;;;83                         {
;;;84                             #if 1
;;;85                             if(stKeyScanGroup[i].m_KSTypeComboEnable)
0000c8  ebc400c4          RSB      r0,r4,r4,LSL #3
0000cc  49a1              LDR      r1,|L106.852|
0000ce  eb010080          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #2
0000d2  7a40              LDRB     r0,[r0,#9]
0000d4  b360              CBZ      r0,|L106.304|
;;;86                             {
;;;87                                 if(tKeyvFunction == stKeyScanGroup[i].m_KSTypeKeyNomalType)
0000d6  ebc400c4          RSB      r0,r4,r4,LSL #3
0000da  eb010080          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #2
0000de  7a00              LDRB     r0,[r0,#8]
0000e0  499f              LDR      r1,|L106.864|
0000e2  7809              LDRB     r1,[r1,#0]  ; tKeyvFunction
0000e4  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0000e6  d10b              BNE      |L106.256|
;;;88                                 {
;;;89                                     PlatformTimerSet(etKEY_CobomTime,stKeyScanGroup[i].m_KSTypeComboTime);
0000e8  ebc400c4          RSB      r0,r4,r4,LSL #3
0000ec  4a99              LDR      r2,|L106.852|
0000ee  eb020080          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #2
0000f2  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]
0000f4  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
0000f6  f7fffffe          BL       PlatformTimerSet
;;;90                                     ComboKeyFlag = TRUE;
0000fa  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
0000fc  4999              LDR      r1,|L106.868|
0000fe  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
                  |L106.256|
;;;91                                 }
;;;92     
;;;93                                 if((ComboKeyFlag == TRUE)&&(PlatformTimerGet(etKEY_CobomTime)==0))
000100  4898              LDR      r0,|L106.868|
000102  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; ComboKeyFlag

                  |L108.16|

                  |L108.22|

00012c  f1b80f01          CMP      r8,#1                 ;3339
000130  d102              BNE      |L113.312|
000132  a00b              ADR      r0,|L113.352|
000134  68e1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0xc]          ;3341
000136  4788              BLX      r1                    ;3341
                  |L113.312|
000138  bf00              NOP      
00013a  e770              B        |L113.30|
;;;3344   #endif
                          ENDP

                  |L113.316|
                          DCD      g_u8MultiCmdDelayCounter
                  |L113.320|

                  |L113.324|
                          DCD      cmd_list
                  |L113.328|

                          AREA ||i.mapp_NewKeyScan||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_NewKeyScan PROC
;;;228    
;;;229    void mapp_NewKeyScan(void)
000000  b5fe              PUSH     {r1-r7,lr}
;;;230    {
;;;231        u32 l_u32KeypadValue[3] = {0,0,0};
000002  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000004  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
000006  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
000008  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
;;;232        u16 l_u16KeyValue = 0;
00000a  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;233        static u32 sl_u32PreKeyValue[3] = {0,0,0};

;;;235        u8 i;
;;;236        pstNewKeyDeclare_t l_pstKey = (pstNewKeyDeclare_t)&stProjectNewKeyTable[0];

;;;237    
;;;238        if(!(PlatformTimerExpired(etKEY_Detect)))
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       PlatformTimerExpired
000012  b900              CBNZ     r0,|L114.22|
                  |L114.20|
;;;239            return;
;;;240        for(i=0;i<emKeyName_max;i++)
;;;241        {
;;;242            if(l_pstKey->pstNewKeyPort != NULL)
;;;243            {
;;;244                //if(l_pstKey->bIsDipKey == TRUE)
;;;245                {
;;;246                    l_u16KeyValue = GPIO_ReadInputDataBit(STM32_GPIO_PORT[l_pstKey->pstNewKeyPort->u8PortType-PORT_GPIOA], l_pstKey->pstNewKeyPort->u16GpioPin);
;;;247                    if(l_pstKey->eNewKeyOnLevel == ePinLevel_High)
;;;248                        l_u32KeypadValue[l_pstKey->u8KeyGroup] = (l_u16KeyValue == 1) ? (l_u32KeypadValue[l_pstKey->u8KeyGroup]|l_pstKey->u32KeyValue) : l_u32KeypadValue[l_pstKey->u8KeyGroup];
;;;249                    else
;;;250                        l_u32KeypadValue[l_pstKey->u8KeyGroup] = (l_u16KeyValue == 0) ? (l_u32KeypadValue[l_pstKey->u8KeyGroup]|l_pstKey->u32KeyValue) : l_u32KeypadValue[l_pstKey->u8KeyGroup];
;;;251                }
;;;252            }
;;;253            else
;;;254                break;
;;;255    
;;;256            l_pstKey++;
;;;257        }
;;;258    
;;;259    
;;;260        for(i=0;i<3;i++)
;;;261        {
;;;262            if(sl_u32PreKeyValue[i] != l_u32KeypadValue[i])
;;;263            {
;;;264                sl_u32PreKeyValue[i] = l_u32KeypadValue[i];
;;;265                //RS232_printf("sl_u16KeyValue[%d] = 0x%04x\n",i,sl_u32PreKeyValue[i]);
;;;266            }
;;;267        }
;;;268        mapp_KeyValueScan(l_u32KeypadValue);
;;;269        PlatformTimerSet(etKEY_Detect,50);
;;;270    }
000014  bdfe              POP      {r1-r7,pc}
                  |L114.22|
000016  2500              MOVS     r5,#0                 ;240
000018  e02f              B        |L114.122|
                  |L114.26|
00001a  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;242
00001c  b348              CBZ      r0,|L114.114|
00001e  6822              LDR      r2,[r4,#0]            ;246
000020  8851              LDRH     r1,[r2,#2]            ;246

000024  1e52              SUBS     r2,r2,#1              ;246

000028  f8530022          LDR      r0,[r3,r2,LSL #2]     ;246
00002c  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_ReadInputDataBit
000030  4606              MOV      r6,r0                 ;246

000034  2801              CMP      r0,#1                 ;247

                  mapp_SetAudioMute PROC

;;;282    void mapp_SetAudioMute(u8 u8AudioID,bool bEnable)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;283    {

;;;285        u16 l_u16EnPin = stProjectGpioTable[eGpioName_AUDIO_MUTE1+u8AudioID].u16GpioPin;
000016  f104000f          ADD      r0,r4,#0xf
00001a  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1
00001e  eb010040          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #1
000022  8847              LDRH     r7,[r0,#2]

000024  b145              CBZ      r5,|L115.56|
;;;287        {
;;;288            GPIO_WriteBit(STM32_GPIO_PORT[l_u8EnPort-PORT_GPIOA],l_u16EnPin,Bit_SET);

000028  4a09              LDR      r2,|L115.80|

00002e  2201              MOVS     r2,#1

000032  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_WriteBit
000036  e007              B        |L115.72|
                  |L115.56|
;;;289        }
;;;290        else
;;;291        {
;;;292            GPIO_WriteBit(STM32_GPIO_PORT[l_u8EnPort-PORT_GPIOA],l_u16EnPin,Bit_RESET);

00003a  4a05              LDR      r2,|L115.80|

000040  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000042  4639              MOV      r1,r7
000044  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_WriteBit
                  |L115.72|
;;;293        }
;;;294    }

;;;295    
                          ENDP

                  |L117.36|

                  |L117.56|
;;;270    		}

                          AREA ||i.mapp_UartUserEdidReceive||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  mapp_UartUserEdidReceive PROC
;;;3382   #if _ENABLE_USER_EDID_LEARNING_FUNCTION
;;;3383   void mapp_UartUserEdidReceive(pstUartCom_t pUartCommVar)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;3384   {
000004  b0c0              SUB      sp,sp,#0x100
000006  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;3385       BYTE CostumEdidbuffer[256] = {0};
000008  f44f7180          MOV      r1,#0x100
00000c  4668              MOV      r0,sp
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr4
;;;3386       u16 i;
;;;3387       if(StartEdidCostumFlag)
000012  4863              LDR      r0,|L121.416|
000014  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; StartEdidCostumFlag
000016  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000018  d07e              BEQ      |L121.280|
;;;3388       {
;;;3389   //        pstProjectGlobalAllVar_t    pstPrjAllVar = &g_stPrjGloVar;
;;;3390   //        pstProjectGlobalSaveVar_t   pstPrjSaveVar = &pstPrjAllVar->stPrjSaveVar;
;;;3391           pstProjectSpecVar_t         pstSpecVar = &stLMX_4OUHS_CSpecVar;
00001a  f8df8188          LDR      r8,|L121.420|
;;;3392           //pstEdidUpgrData_t           pstEdidUpgr;
;;;3393           pstCustomEdid_t             pstEdidOp, pstEdidOrg = &pstSpecVar->stCustomEdidPre1;
00001e  f108078f          ADD      r7,r8,#0x8f
;;;3394   
;;;3395           for(i=0;(i<pUartCommVar->u16RecCnt)&&(i<256);i++)
000022  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000024  e005              B        |L121.50|
                  |L121.38|
;;;3396           {
;;;3397               CostumEdidbuffer[i] = pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer[i];
000026  69a0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x18]
000028  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
00002a  f80d0005          STRB     r0,[sp,r5]
00002e  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1              ;3395
000030  b285              UXTH     r5,r0                 ;3395
                  |L121.50|
000032  8ae0              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0x16]         ;3395
000034  42a8              CMP      r0,r5                 ;3395
000036  dd01              BLE      |L121.60|
000038  2dff              CMP      r5,#0xff              ;3395
00003a  ddf4              BLE      |L121.38|
                  |L121.60|
;;;3398   
;;;3399               #if 0
;;;3400               if((i>0)&&(i%8==0))
;;;3401                   RS232_printf("\n");
;;;3402               RS232_printf("0x%02x,",pUartCommVar->pRecBuffer[i]);
;;;3403               #endif
;;;3404           }
;;;3405           // 128 bit edid
;;;3406           if( (pUartCommVar->u16RecCnt==128) && (CostumEdidbuffer[0x7e]==00))
00003c  8ae0              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0x16]
00003e  2880              CMP      r0,#0x80
000040  d154              BNE      |L121.236|
